authors_text: Qinghao Ye,Guohai Xu,Ming Yan,Haiyang Xu,Qi Qian,Ji Zhang,Fei Huang
title: HiTeA: Hierarchical Temporal-Aware Video-Language Pre-training
title_zh: HiTeA：分层时间感知视频语言预训练
abstract: Video-language pre-training has advanced the performance of various downstream video-language tasks. However, most previous methods directly inherit or adapt typical image-language pre-training paradigms to video-language pre-training, thus not fully exploiting the unique characteristic of video, i.e., temporal. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Temporal-Aware video-language pre-training framework, HiTeA, with two novel pre-training tasks for modeling cross-modal alignment between moments and texts as well as the temporal relations of video-text pairs. Specifically, we propose a cross-modal moment exploration task to explore moments in videos, which results in detailed video moment representation. Besides, the inherent temporal relations are captured by aligning video-text pairs as a whole in different time resolutions with multi-modal temporal relation exploration task. Furthermore, we introduce the shuffling test to evaluate the temporal reliance of datasets and video-language pre-training models. We achieve state-of-the-art results on 15 well-established video-language understanding and generation tasks, especially on temporal-oriented datasets (e.g., SSv2-Template and SSv2-Label) with 8.6% and 11.1% improvement respectively. HiTeA also demonstrates strong generalization ability when directly transferred to downstream tasks in a zero-shot manner. Models and demo will be available on ModelScope.
summary: Video-language pre-training has advanced the performance of various downstream video-language tasks. However, most previous methods directly inherit or adapt typical image-language pre-training paradigms to video-language pre-training, thus not fully exploiting the unique characteristic of video, i.e., temporal. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Temporal-Aware video-language pre-training framework, HiTeA, with two novel pre-training tasks for modeling cross-modal alignment between moments and texts as well as the temporal relations of video-text pairs. Specifically, we propose a cross-modal moment exploration task to explore moments in videos, which results in detailed video moment representation. Besides, the inherent temporal relations are captured by aligning video-text pairs as a whole in different time resolutions with multi-modal temporal relation exploration task. Furthermore, we introduce the shuffling test to evaluate the temporal reliance of datasets and video-language pre-training models. We achieve state-of-the-art results on 15 well-established video-language understanding and generation tasks, especially on temporal-oriented datasets (e.g., SSv2-Template and SSv2-Label) with 8.6% and 11.1% improvement respectively. HiTeA also demonstrates strong generalization ability when directly transferred to downstream tasks in a zero-shot manner. Models and demo will be available on ModelScope.
abstract_zh: 视频语言预训练提高了各种下游视频语言任务的性能。然而，大多数先前的方法直接继承或适应典型的图像语言预训练范式到视频语言预训练，从而没有充分利用视频的独特特性，即时间性。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层时间感知视频语言预训练框架 HiTeA，它具有两个新颖的预训练任务，用于对时刻和文本之间的跨模式对齐以及视频文本对的时间关系进行建模。具体来说，我们提出了一种跨模式时刻探索任务来探索视频中的时刻，从而产生详细的视频时刻表示。此外，通过多模态时间关系探索任务将不同时间分辨率下的视频-文本对作为一个整体进行对齐，从而捕获固有的时间关系。此外，我们引入了洗牌测试来评估数据集和视频语言预训练模型的时间依赖性。我们在 15 个成熟的视频语言理解和生成任务上取得了最先进的结果，特别是在面向时间的数据集（例如 SSv2-Template 和 SSv2-Label）上，分别提高了 8.6% 和 11.1%。 HiTeA 在以零样本的方式直接转移到下游任务时也表现出了很强的泛化能力。模型和演示将在 ModelScope 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiTeA框架，通过两个新型预训练任务建模视频-文本跨模态对齐及时间关系，提升视频-语言预训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言预训练方法大多沿用图像-语言范式，未能充分挖掘视频特有的时间特性，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计跨模态时刻探索任务建模视频片段与文本对齐，通过多模态时间关系探索任务捕捉整体时间关联，并引入洗牌测试评估时间依赖性。
AI.result: 在15个视频-语言任务中取得SOTA结果，尤其在时间导向数据集SSv2-Template和SSv2-Label上分别提升8.6%和11.1%，且具备强零样本迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: HiTeA通过层次化时间感知建模有效提升视频-语言理解与生成能力，模型已在ModelScope开源。

authors_text: Hangyu Mao,Rui Zhao,Hao Chen,Jianye Hao,Yiqun Chen,Dong Li,Junge Zhang,Zhen Xiao
title: Transformer in Transformer as Backbone for Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Transformer 中的 Transformer 作为深度强化学习的骨干
comment: As far as we know, TIT is the first pure Transformer-based backbone for deep online and offline RL, and it also extends the offline SL paradigm proposed by Decision Transformer
comments: As far as we know, TIT is the first pure Transformer-based backbone for deep online and offline RL, and it also extends the offline SL paradigm proposed by Decision Transformer
abstract: Designing better deep networks and better reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are both important for deep RL. This work focuses on the former. Previous methods build the network with several modules like CNN, LSTM and Attention. Recent methods combine the Transformer with these modules for better performance. However, it requires tedious optimization skills to train a network composed of mixed modules, making these methods inconvenient to be used in practice. In this paper, we propose to design \emph{pure Transformer-based networks} for deep RL, aiming at providing off-the-shelf backbones for both the online and offline settings. Specifically, the Transformer in Transformer (TIT) backbone is proposed, which cascades two Transformers in a very natural way: the inner one is used to process a single observation, while the outer one is responsible for processing the observation history; combining both is expected to extract spatial-temporal representations for good decision-making. Experiments show that TIT can achieve satisfactory performance in different settings consistently.
summary: Designing better deep networks and better reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms are both important for deep RL. This work focuses on the former. Previous methods build the network with several modules like CNN, LSTM and Attention. Recent methods combine the Transformer with these modules for better performance. However, it requires tedious optimization skills to train a network composed of mixed modules, making these methods inconvenient to be used in practice. In this paper, we propose to design \emph{pure Transformer-based networks} for deep RL, aiming at providing off-the-shelf backbones for both the online and offline settings. Specifically, the Transformer in Transformer (TIT) backbone is proposed, which cascades two Transformers in a very natural way: the inner one is used to process a single observation, while the outer one is responsible for processing the observation history; combining both is expected to extract spatial-temporal representations for good decision-making. Experiments show that TIT can achieve satisfactory performance in different settings consistently.
abstract_zh: 设计更好的深度网络和更好的强化学习 (RL) 算法对于深度 RL 都很重要。这项工作主要针对前者。以前的方法使用 CNN、LSTM 和 Attention 等多个模块构建网络。最近的方法将 Transformer 与这些模块结合起来以获得更好的性能。然而，训练由混合模块组成的网络需要繁琐的优化技巧，使得这些方法在实践中不方便使用。在本文中，我们建议为深度强化学习设计\emph{纯基于 Transformer 的网络}，旨在为在线和离线设置提供现成的主干网络。具体来说，提出了 Transformer in Transformer (TIT) 主干，它以一种非常自然的方式级联两个 Transformer：内部的 Transformer 用于处理单个观察，而外部的 Transformer 负责处理观察历史；将两者结合起来有望提取时空表示以做出良好的决策。实验表明，TIT 在不同的设置下都能一致地获得令人满意的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种纯Transformer架构作为深度强化学习的通用主干网络，解决混合模块训练复杂的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法依赖混合模块（如CNN/LSTM/Attention），但需复杂优化技巧，实用性不足。
AI.method: 设计Transformer in Transformer（TIT）结构：内部Transformer处理单帧观测，外部Transformer处理观测历史，融合时空信息。
AI.result: 实验表明TIT在多种设定下均能稳定达到满意性能，验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 纯Transformer架构TIT为深度强化学习提供了即用型通用主干，简化训练流程并提升性能。

authors_text: Colorado J. Reed,Ritwik Gupta,Shufan Li,Sarah Brockman,Christopher Funk,Brian Clipp,Kurt Keutzer,Salvatore Candido,Matt Uyttendaele,Trevor Darrell
title: Scale-MAE: A Scale-Aware Masked Autoencoder for Multiscale Geospatial Representation Learning
title_zh: Scale-MAE：用于多尺度地理空间表示学习的尺度感知屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Large, pretrained models are commonly finetuned with imagery that is heavily augmented to mimic different conditions and scales, with the resulting models used for various tasks with imagery from a range of spatial scales. Such models overlook scale-specific information in the data for scale-dependent domains, such as remote sensing. In this paper, we present Scale-MAE, a pretraining method that explicitly learns relationships between data at different, known scales throughout the pretraining process. Scale-MAE pretrains a network by masking an input image at a known input scale, where the area of the Earth covered by the image determines the scale of the ViT positional encoding, not the image resolution. Scale-MAE encodes the masked image with a standard ViT backbone, and then decodes the masked image through a bandpass filter to reconstruct low/high frequency images at lower/higher scales. We find that tasking the network with reconstructing both low/high frequency images leads to robust multiscale representations for remote sensing imagery. Scale-MAE achieves an average of a $2.4 - 5.6\%$ non-parametric kNN classification improvement across eight remote sensing datasets compared to current state-of-the-art and obtains a $0.9$ mIoU to $1.7$ mIoU improvement on the SpaceNet building segmentation transfer task for a range of evaluation scales.
summary: Large, pretrained models are commonly finetuned with imagery that is heavily augmented to mimic different conditions and scales, with the resulting models used for various tasks with imagery from a range of spatial scales. Such models overlook scale-specific information in the data for scale-dependent domains, such as remote sensing. In this paper, we present Scale-MAE, a pretraining method that explicitly learns relationships between data at different, known scales throughout the pretraining process. Scale-MAE pretrains a network by masking an input image at a known input scale, where the area of the Earth covered by the image determines the scale of the ViT positional encoding, not the image resolution. Scale-MAE encodes the masked image with a standard ViT backbone, and then decodes the masked image through a bandpass filter to reconstruct low/high frequency images at lower/higher scales. We find that tasking the network with reconstructing both low/high frequency images leads to robust multiscale representations for remote sensing imagery. Scale-MAE achieves an average of a $2.4 - 5.6\%$ non-parametric kNN classification improvement across eight remote sensing datasets compared to current state-of-the-art and obtains a $0.9$ mIoU to $1.7$ mIoU improvement on the SpaceNet building segmentation transfer task for a range of evaluation scales.
abstract_zh: 大型预训练模型通常会使用大量增强的图像进行微调，以模拟不同的条件和尺度，所得模型可用于具有一系列空间尺度图像的各种任务。此类模型忽略了尺度相关领域（例如遥感）数据中特定于尺度的信息。在本文中，我们提出了 Scale-MAE，这是一种预训练方法，可以在整个预训练过程中明确学习不同已知尺度的数据之间的关系。 Scale-MAE 通过以已知输入比例屏蔽输入图像来预训练网络，其中图像覆盖的地球区域决定了 ViT 位置编码的比例，而不是图像分辨率。 Scale-MAE 使用标准 ViT 主干对屏蔽图像进行编码，然后通过带通滤波器对屏蔽图像进行解码，以较低/较高尺度重建低频/高频图像。我们发现，让网络重建低频/高频图像可以为遥感图像提供鲁棒的多尺度表示。与当前最先进的技术相比，Scale-MAE 在 8 个遥感数据集上实现了平均 2.4 - 5.6%$ 非参数 kNN 分类改进，并在一系列评估尺度的 SpaceNet 构建分段传输任务上获得了 0.9$ mIoU 到 $1.7$ mIoU 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scale-MAE，一种显式学习多尺度关系的预训练方法，用于遥感图像的多尺度表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有模型通过数据增强模拟不同尺度，但忽视了遥感等尺度依赖领域中特定尺度信息的重要性，导致模型在尺度相关任务中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过掩码输入图像并利用带通滤波器解码，重建不同尺度的高低频图像，使网络学习多尺度关系。ViT编码器处理掩码图像，解码器生成多尺度重建结果。
AI.result: 在8个遥感数据集上kNN分类任务平均提升2.4-5.6%，SpaceNet建筑分割任务mIoU提升0.9-1.7。
AI.conclusion: Scale-MAE通过显式建模多尺度关系，显著提升了遥感图像的跨尺度表示能力，优于现有方法。

search_text: Scale-MAE: A Scale-Aware Masked Autoencoder for Multiscale Geospatial Representation Learning Scale-MAE：用于多尺度地理空间表示学习的尺度感知屏蔽自动编码器 Large, pretrained models are commonly finetuned with imagery that is heavily augmented to mimic different conditions and scales, with the resulting models used for various tasks with imagery from a range of spatial scales. Such models overlook scale-specific information in the data for scale-dependent domains, such as remote sensing. In this paper, we present Scale-MAE, a pretraining method that explicitly learns relationships between data at different, known scales throughout the pretraining process. Scale-MAE pretrains a network by masking an input image at a known input scale, where the area of the Earth covered by the image determines the scale of the ViT positional encoding, not the image resolution. Scale-MAE encodes the masked image with a standard ViT backbone, and then decodes the masked image through a bandpass filter to reconstruct low/high frequency images at lower/higher scales. We find that tasking the network with reconstructing both low/high frequency images leads to robust multiscale representations for remote sensing imagery. Scale-MAE achieves an average of a $2.4 - 5.6\%$ non-parametric kNN classification improvement across eight remote sensing datasets compared to current state-of-the-art and obtains a $0.9$ mIoU to $1.7$ mIoU improvement on the SpaceNet building segmentation transfer task for a range of evaluation scales. 大型预训练模型通常会使用大量增强的图像进行微调，以模拟不同的条件和尺度，所得模型可用于具有一系列空间尺度图像的各种任务。此类模型忽略了尺度相关领域（例如遥感）数据中特定于尺度的信息。在本文中，我们提出了 Scale-MAE，这是一种预训练方法，可以在整个预训练过程中明确学习不同已知尺度的数据之间的关系。 Scale-MAE 通过以已知输入比例屏蔽输入图像来预训练网络，其中图像覆盖的地球区域决定了 ViT 位置编码的比例，而不是图像分辨率。 Scale-MAE 使用标准 ViT 主干对屏蔽图像进行编码，然后通过带通滤波器对屏蔽图像进行解码，以较低/较高尺度重建低频/高频图像。我们发现，让网络重建低频/高频图像可以为遥感图像提供鲁棒的多尺度表示。与当前最先进的技术相比，Scale-MAE 在 8 个遥感数据集上实现了平均 2.4 - 5.6%$ 非参数 kNN 分类改进，并在一系列评估尺度的 SpaceNet 构建分段传输任务上获得了 0.9$ mIoU 到 $1.7$ mIoU 改进。 本文提出Scale-MAE，一种显式学习多尺度关系的预训练方法，用于遥感图像的多尺度表示学习。 Colorado J. Reed,Ritwik Gupta,Shufan Li,Sarah Brockman,Christopher Funk,Brian Clipp,Kurt Keutzer,Salvatore Candido,Matt Uyttendaele,Trevor Darrell cs.CV

authors_text: Khimya Khetarpal,Claire Vernade,Brendan O'Donoghue,Satinder Singh,Tom Zahavy
title: POMRL: No-Regret Learning-to-Plan with Increasing Horizons
title_zh: POMRL：随着视野的增加，无悔地学习计划
abstract: We study the problem of planning under model uncertainty in an online meta-reinforcement learning (RL) setting where an agent is presented with a sequence of related tasks with limited interactions per task. The agent can use its experience in each task and across tasks to estimate both the transition model and the distribution over tasks. We propose an algorithm to meta-learn the underlying structure across tasks, utilize it to plan in each task, and upper-bound the regret of the planning loss. Our bound suggests that the average regret over tasks decreases as the number of tasks increases and as the tasks are more similar. In the classical single-task setting, it is known that the planning horizon should depend on the estimated model's accuracy, that is, on the number of samples within task. We generalize this finding to meta-RL and study this dependence of planning horizons on the number of tasks. Based on our theoretical findings, we derive heuristics for selecting slowly increasing discount factors, and we validate its significance empirically.
summary: We study the problem of planning under model uncertainty in an online meta-reinforcement learning (RL) setting where an agent is presented with a sequence of related tasks with limited interactions per task. The agent can use its experience in each task and across tasks to estimate both the transition model and the distribution over tasks. We propose an algorithm to meta-learn the underlying structure across tasks, utilize it to plan in each task, and upper-bound the regret of the planning loss. Our bound suggests that the average regret over tasks decreases as the number of tasks increases and as the tasks are more similar. In the classical single-task setting, it is known that the planning horizon should depend on the estimated model's accuracy, that is, on the number of samples within task. We generalize this finding to meta-RL and study this dependence of planning horizons on the number of tasks. Based on our theoretical findings, we derive heuristics for selecting slowly increasing discount factors, and we validate its significance empirically.
abstract_zh: 我们研究在线元强化学习（RL）设置中模型不确定性下的规划问题，其中向代理呈现一系列相关任务，每个任务的交互有限。代理可以利用其在每个任务和跨任务中的经验来估计转换模型和任务分布。我们提出了一种算法来元学习跨任务的底层结构，利用它来规划每个任务，并限制规划损失的遗憾。我们的界限表明，随着任务数量的增加以及任务更加相似，对任务的平均遗憾会减少。在经典的单任务设置中，众所周知，规划范围应取决于估计模型的准确性，即任务内的样本数量。我们将这一发现推广到元强化学习中，并研究了规划范围对任务数量的依赖性。根据我们的理论发现，我们推导出选择缓慢增加的折扣因子的启发式方法，并通过实证验证其重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线元强化学习中模型不确定下的规划问题，提出了一种能够减少遗憾的算法，并分析了规划视野与任务数量的关系。
AI.motivation: 传统单任务规划中，规划视野依赖于模型准确性，但元RL面临任务相关性高、样本有限的挑战，需有效利用跨任务信息以减少遗憾。
AI.method: 提出POMRL算法，通过元学习跨任务结构，结合任务内经验进行规划，并推导了规划损失的遗憾上界及折扣因子选择策略。
AI.result: 理论分析表明平均遗憾随任务数量和相似度增加而减少，实验验证了所提方法的有效性及折扣因子调整的必要性。
AI.conclusion: POMRL通过跨任务元学习和动态调整规划视野，在元RL中实现了低遗憾规划，为相关研究提供了理论支持与实践指导。

authors_text: Jiang Xie,Pengfei Zhao,Shuyin Xia,Guoyin Wang,Dongdong Cheng
title: A novel cluster internal evaluation index based on hyper-balls
title_zh: 一种基于超球的新型集群内部评价指标
abstract: It is crucial to evaluate the quality and determine the optimal number of clusters in cluster analysis. In this paper, the multi-granularity characterization of the data set is carried out to obtain the hyper-balls. The cluster internal evaluation index based on hyper-balls(HCVI) is defined. Moreover, a general method for determining the optimal number of clusters based on HCVI is proposed. The proposed methods can evaluate the clustering results produced by the several classic methods and determine the optimal cluster number for data sets containing noises and clusters with arbitrary shapes. The experimental results on synthetic and real data sets indicate that the new index outperforms existing ones.
summary: It is crucial to evaluate the quality and determine the optimal number of clusters in cluster analysis. In this paper, the multi-granularity characterization of the data set is carried out to obtain the hyper-balls. The cluster internal evaluation index based on hyper-balls(HCVI) is defined. Moreover, a general method for determining the optimal number of clusters based on HCVI is proposed. The proposed methods can evaluate the clustering results produced by the several classic methods and determine the optimal cluster number for data sets containing noises and clusters with arbitrary shapes. The experimental results on synthetic and real data sets indicate that the new index outperforms existing ones.
abstract_zh: 在聚类分析中评估质量并确定最佳聚类数量至关重要。本文对数据集进行多粒度表征以获得超球。定义了基于超球的集群内部评价指标（HCVI）。此外，还提出了一种基于HCVI确定最佳簇数的通用方法。所提出的方法可以评估几种经典方法产生的聚类结果，并确定包含噪声和任意形状的簇的数据集的最佳簇数。合成数据集和真实数据集的实验结果表明，新指数优于现有指数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超球体的聚类内部评估指标HCVI，用于评估聚类质量并确定最佳聚类数目。
AI.motivation: 现有聚类评估指标在处理含噪声和任意形状聚类的数据集时存在局限性，需改进评估方法。
AI.method: 通过多粒度特征提取超球体，定义HCVI指标，并提出基于该指标确定最佳聚类数的通用方法。
AI.result: 实验表明HCVI在合成及真实数据集上优于现有指标，能有效评估多种聚类方法并确定最佳聚类数。
AI.conclusion: HCVI方法在噪声和复杂形状聚类场景下表现优异，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zehua Chen,Yihan Wu,Yichong Leng,Jiawei Chen,Haohe Liu,Xu Tan,Yang Cui,Ke Wang,Lei He,Sheng Zhao,Jiang Bian,Danilo Mandic
title: ResGrad: Residual Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Text to Speech
title_zh: ResGrad：文本到语音的残余去噪扩散概率模型
abstract: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) are emerging in text-to-speech (TTS) synthesis because of their strong capability of generating high-fidelity samples. However, their iterative refinement process in high-dimensional data space results in slow inference speed, which restricts their application in real-time systems. Previous works have explored speeding up by minimizing the number of inference steps but at the cost of sample quality. In this work, to improve the inference speed for DDPM-based TTS model while achieving high sample quality, we propose ResGrad, a lightweight diffusion model which learns to refine the output spectrogram of an existing TTS model (e.g., FastSpeech 2) by predicting the residual between the model output and the corresponding ground-truth speech. ResGrad has several advantages: 1) Compare with other acceleration methods for DDPM which need to synthesize speech from scratch, ResGrad reduces the complexity of task by changing the generation target from ground-truth mel-spectrogram to the residual, resulting into a more lightweight model and thus a smaller real-time factor. 2) ResGrad is employed in the inference process of the existing TTS model in a plug-and-play way, without re-training this model. We verify ResGrad on the single-speaker dataset LJSpeech and two more challenging datasets with multiple speakers (LibriTTS) and high sampling rate (VCTK). Experimental results show that in comparison with other speed-up methods of DDPMs: 1) ResGrad achieves better sample quality with the same inference speed measured by real-time factor; 2) with similar speech quality, ResGrad synthesizes speech faster than baseline methods by more than 10 times. Audio samples are available at https://resgrad1.github.io/.

However, their iterative refinement process in high-dimensional data space results in slow inference speed, which restricts their application in real-time systems. Previous works have explored speeding up by minimizing the number of inference steps but at the cost of sample quality. In this work, to improve the inference speed for DDPM-based TTS model while achieving high sample quality, we propose ResGrad, a lightweight diffusion model which learns to refine the output spectrogram of an existing TTS model (e.g., FastSpeech 2) by predicting the residual between the model output and the corresponding ground-truth speech. We verify ResGrad on the single-speaker dataset LJSpeech and two more challenging datasets with multiple speakers (LibriTTS) and high sampling rate (VCTK). Experimental results show that in comparison with other speed-up methods of DDPMs: 1) ResGrad achieves better sample quality with the same inference speed measured by real-time factor; 2) with similar speech quality, ResGrad synthesizes speech faster than baseline methods by more than 10 times. Audio samples are available at https://resgrad1.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型 (DDPM) 因其生成高保真样本的强大能力而在文本转语音 (TTS) 合成中兴起。然而，它们在高维数据空间中的迭代细化过程导致推理速度慢，限制了它们在实时系统中的应用。之前的工作已经探索通过最小化推理步骤的数量来加速，但以牺牲样本质量为代价。在这项工作中，为了提高基于 DDPM 的 TTS 模型的推理速度，同时实现高样本质量，我们提出了 ResGrad，一种轻量级扩散模型，它通过预测模型输出和相应的真实语音之间的残差来学习细化现有 TTS 模型（例如 FastSpeech 2）的输出频谱图。 ResGrad 有几个优点：1）与其他需要从头开始合成语音的 DDPM 加速方法相比，ResGrad 通过将生成目标从真实梅尔谱图更改为残差来降低任务复杂度，从而得到更轻量级的模型，从而获得更小的实时因子。 2）ResGrad以即插即用的方式应用于现有TTS模型的推理过程，无需重新训练该模型。我们在单说话人数据集 LJSpeech 和两个更具挑战性的多说话人 (LibriTTS) 和高采样率 (VCTK) 数据集上验证 ResGrad。实验结果表明，与DDPM的其他加速方法相比：1）ResGrad在实时因子测量的相同推理速度下实现了更好的样本质量； 2）在相似的语音质量下，ResGrad 合成语音的速度比基线方法快 10 倍以上。音频样本可在 https://resgrad1.github.io/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResGrad，一种通过预测残差改进基于扩散概率模型的文本到语音合成推理速度的方法。
AI.motivation: 扩散概率模型（DDPM）在文本到语音合成中生成高质量样本，但其高维空间迭代精炼过程导致推理速度慢，影响实时应用。现有加速方法牺牲了样本质量。
AI.method: ResGrad通过预测现有TTS模型（如FastSpeech 2）输出与真实语音之间的残差，而非从头生成谱图，降低任务复杂度。该方法以插件形式集成到现有模型推理流程中，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在LJSpeech、LibriTTS和VCTK数据集上，ResGrad在相同实时因子下优于其他加速方法，或在相似质量下提速超10倍。
AI.conclusion: ResGrad通过残差学习有效平衡了DDPM的推理速度与样本质量，为实时语音合成提供了轻量级解决方案。

authors_text: Miguel Xochicale,Louise Thwaites,Sophie Yacoub,Luigi Pisani,Phung-Nhat Tran-Huy,Hamideh Kerdegari,Andrew King,Alberto Gomez
title: A Machine Learning Case Study for AI-empowered echocardiography of Intensive Care Unit Patients in low- and middle-income countries
title_zh: 低收入和中等收入国家重症监护病房患者人工智能超声心动图的机器学习案例研究
abstract: We present a Machine Learning (ML) study case to illustrate the challenges of clinical translation for a real-time AI-empowered echocardiography system with data of ICU patients in LMICs. Such ML case study includes data preparation, curation and labelling from 2D Ultrasound videos of 31 ICU patients in LMICs and model selection, validation and deployment of three thinner neural networks to classify apical four-chamber view. Results of the ML heuristics showed the promising implementation, validation and application of thinner networks to classify 4CV with limited datasets. We conclude this work mentioning the need for (a) datasets to improve diversity of demographics, diseases, and (b) the need of further investigations of thinner models to be run and implemented in low-cost hardware to be clinically translated in the ICU in LMICs. The code and other resources to reproduce this work are available at https://github.com/vital-ultrasound/ai-assisted-echocardiography-for-low-resource-countries.
summary: We present a Machine Learning (ML) study case to illustrate the challenges of clinical translation for a real-time AI-empowered echocardiography system with data of ICU patients in LMICs. Such ML case study includes data preparation, curation and labelling from 2D Ultrasound videos of 31 ICU patients in LMICs and model selection, validation and deployment of three thinner neural networks to classify apical four-chamber view. Results of the ML heuristics showed the promising implementation, validation and application of thinner networks to classify 4CV with limited datasets. We conclude this work mentioning the need for (a) datasets to improve diversity of demographics, diseases, and (b) the need of further investigations of thinner models to be run and implemented in low-cost hardware to be clinically translated in the ICU in LMICs. The code and other resources to reproduce this work are available at https://github.com/vital-ultrasound/ai-assisted-echocardiography-for-low-resource-countries.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个机器学习 (ML) 研究案例，通过中低收入国家 ICU 患者的数据来说明实时人工智能超声心动图系统临床转化的挑战。此类 ML 案例研究包括中低收入国家 31 名 ICU 患者的 2D 超声视频的数据准备、管理和标记，以及模型选择、验证和部署三个更薄的神经网络以对心尖四腔视图进行分类。机器学习启发式的结果表明，更薄的网络在有限数据集下对 4CV 进行分类的实现、验证和应用前景广阔。我们在这项工作的结论中提到，需要（a）数据集来改善人口统计、疾病的多样性，以及（b）需要进一步研究在低成本硬件中运行和实施的更薄模型，以便在中低收入国家的 ICU 中进行临床转化。重现这项工作的代码和其他资源可在 https://github.com/vital-ultrasound/ai-auxiliary-echocardiography-for-low-resource-countries 获取。

AI.tldr: 论文探讨在低收入和中等收入国家ICU患者中应用AI辅助超声心动图的临床转化挑战，并验证轻量神经网络模型的可行性。
AI.motivation: 解决资源有限地区ICU患者超声心动图诊断的可及性和准确性问题，通过AI技术提升诊断效率但面临数据与硬件限制。
AI.method: 基于31名LMICs患者2D超声视频数据，进行数据预处理与标注，并采用三个轻量神经网络模型分类心尖四腔心视图。
AI.result: 轻量网络在有限数据集上实现有效分类，验证了AI辅助超声心动图在资源受限环境下的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 需扩展数据集多样性并进一步优化轻量模型以适配低成本硬件，推动其在LMICs的临床落地。

title: Improving Visual Representation Learning through Perceptual Understanding
title_zh: 通过感知理解提高视觉表征学习
comment: v2: add additional details on MSG-MAE. In Proc CVPR 2023
comments: v2: add additional details on MSG-MAE. In Proc CVPR 2023
abstract: We present an extension to masked autoencoders (MAE) which improves on the representations learnt by the model by explicitly encouraging the learning of higher scene-level features. We do this by: (i) the introduction of a perceptual similarity term between generated and real images (ii) incorporating several techniques from the adversarial training literature including multi-scale training and adaptive discriminator augmentation. The combination of these results in not only better pixel reconstruction but also representations which appear to capture better higher-level details within images. More consequentially, we show how our method, Perceptual MAE, leads to better performance when used for downstream tasks outperforming previous methods. We achieve 78.1% top-1 accuracy linear probing on ImageNet-1K and up to 88.1% when fine-tuning, with similar results for other downstream tasks, all without use of additional pre-trained models or data.
summary: We present an extension to masked autoencoders (MAE) which improves on the representations learnt by the model by explicitly encouraging the learning of higher scene-level features. We do this by: (i) the introduction of a perceptual similarity term between generated and real images (ii) incorporating several techniques from the adversarial training literature including multi-scale training and adaptive discriminator augmentation. The combination of these results in not only better pixel reconstruction but also representations which appear to capture better higher-level details within images. More consequentially, we show how our method, Perceptual MAE, leads to better performance when used for downstream tasks outperforming previous methods. We achieve 78.1% top-1 accuracy linear probing on ImageNet-1K and up to 88.1% when fine-tuning, with similar results for other downstream tasks, all without use of additional pre-trained models or data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了掩码自动编码器（MAE）的扩展，它通过明确鼓励学习更高的场景级特征来改进模型学习的表示。我们通过以下方式做到这一点：（i）在生成的图像和真实图像之间引入感知相似性术语（ii）结合对抗性训练文献中的多种技术，包括多尺度训练和自适应鉴别器增强。这些的结合不仅可以实现更好的像素重建，而且可以更好地捕捉图像中更高层次的细节。更重要的是，我们展示了我们的方法 Perceptual MAE 在用于下游任务时如何带来比以前的方法更好的性能。我们在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 78.1% 的 top-1 精度线性探测，在微调时达到了 88.1%，其他下游任务也获得了类似的结果，所有这些都无需使用额外的预训练模型或数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的视觉表征学习方法，通过引入感知理解来增强掩码自编码器（MAE）的表征能力。
AI.motivation: 传统掩码自编码器在像素级重建任务中表现良好，但缺乏对图像高层语义特征的捕捉能力，导致下游任务性能受限。
AI.method: 通过引入生成图像与真实图像的感知相似性损失，并结合对抗训练中的多尺度训练和自适应判别器增强技术，提升模型对高层场景特征的学习能力。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，线性探针达到78.1%的Top-1准确率，微调后达88.1%，且未使用额外预训练模型或数据。
AI.conclusion: 感知MAE方法通过显式优化高层特征表征，在保持重建质量的同时显著提升了下游任务性能，为视觉表征学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Improving Visual Representation Learning through Perceptual Understanding 通过感知理解提高视觉表征学习 We present an extension to masked autoencoders (MAE) which improves on the representations learnt by the model by explicitly encouraging the learning of higher scene-level features. We do this by: (i) the introduction of a perceptual similarity term between generated and real images (ii) incorporating several techniques from the adversarial training literature including multi-scale training and adaptive discriminator augmentation. The combination of these results in not only better pixel reconstruction but also representations which appear to capture better higher-level details within images. More consequentially, we show how our method, Perceptual MAE, leads to better performance when used for downstream tasks outperforming previous methods. We achieve 78.1% top-1 accuracy linear probing on ImageNet-1K and up to 88.1% when fine-tuning, with similar results for other downstream tasks, all without use of additional pre-trained models or data. 我们提出了掩码自动编码器（MAE）的扩展，它通过明确鼓励学习更高的场景级特征来改进模型学习的表示。我们通过以下方式做到这一点：（i）在生成的图像和真实图像之间引入感知相似性术语（ii）结合对抗性训练文献中的多种技术，包括多尺度训练和自适应鉴别器增强。这些的结合不仅可以实现更好的像素重建，而且可以更好地捕捉图像中更高层次的细节。更重要的是，我们展示了我们的方法 Perceptual MAE 在用于下游任务时如何带来比以前的方法更好的性能。我们在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 78.1% 的 top-1 精度线性探测，在微调时达到了 88.1%，其他下游任务也获得了类似的结果，所有这些都无需使用额外的预训练模型或数据。 本文提出了一种改进的视觉表征学习方法，通过引入感知理解来增强掩码自编码器（MAE）的表征能力。 Samyakh Tukra,Frederick Hoffman,Ken Chatfield cs.CV

title: Multi-modal deep learning system for depression and anxiety detection
title_zh: 用于抑郁和焦虑检测的多模态深度学习系统
comment: accepted to the PAI4MH workshop at NeurIPS 2022
comments: accepted to the PAI4MH workshop at NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Traditional screening practices for anxiety and depression pose an impediment to monitoring and treating these conditions effectively. However, recent advances in NLP and speech modelling allow textual, acoustic, and hand-crafted language-based features to jointly form the basis of future mental health screening and condition detection. Speech is a rich and readily available source of insight into an individual's cognitive state and by leveraging different aspects of speech, we can develop new digital biomarkers for depression and anxiety. To this end, we propose a multi-modal system for the screening of depression and anxiety from self-administered speech tasks. The proposed model integrates deep-learned features from audio and text, as well as hand-crafted features that are informed by clinically-validated domain knowledge. We find that augmenting hand-crafted features with deep-learned features improves our overall classification F1 score comparing to a baseline of hand-crafted features alone from 0.58 to 0.63 for depression and from 0.54 to 0.57 for anxiety. The findings of our work suggest that speech-based biomarkers for depression and anxiety hold significant promise in the future of digital health.
summary: Traditional screening practices for anxiety and depression pose an impediment to monitoring and treating these conditions effectively. However, recent advances in NLP and speech modelling allow textual, acoustic, and hand-crafted language-based features to jointly form the basis of future mental health screening and condition detection. Speech is a rich and readily available source of insight into an individual's cognitive state and by leveraging different aspects of speech, we can develop new digital biomarkers for depression and anxiety. To this end, we propose a multi-modal system for the screening of depression and anxiety from self-administered speech tasks. The proposed model integrates deep-learned features from audio and text, as well as hand-crafted features that are informed by clinically-validated domain knowledge. We find that augmenting hand-crafted features with deep-learned features improves our overall classification F1 score comparing to a baseline of hand-crafted features alone from 0.58 to 0.63 for depression and from 0.54 to 0.57 for anxiety. The findings of our work suggest that speech-based biomarkers for depression and anxiety hold significant promise in the future of digital health.
abstract_zh: 传统的焦虑和抑郁筛查方法阻碍了有效监测和治疗这些疾病。然而，自然语言处理和语音建模的最新进展允许文本、声学和手工制作的基于语言的特征共同构成未来心理健康筛查和状况检测的基础。语音是了解个人认知状态的丰富且容易获得的来源，通过利用语音的不同方面，我们可以开发新的抑郁和焦虑数字生物标记。为此，我们提出了一种多模态系统，用于从自我管理的言语任务中筛查抑郁和焦虑。所提出的模型集成了来自音频和文本的深度学习特征，以及由临床验证的领域知识提供的手工制作的特征。我们发现，与单独手工制作特征的基线相比，用深度学习的特征增强手工制作的特征可以提高我们的整体分类 F1 分数，抑郁症从 0.58 提高到 0.63，焦虑症从 0.54 提高到 0.57。我们的工作结果表明，基于语音的抑郁和焦虑生物标志物在数字健康的未来具有重大前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态深度学习系统，通过整合语音和文本特征检测抑郁和焦虑。
AI.motivation: 传统筛查方法效率低下，而语音和文本特征结合可提供更有效的心理健康评估手段。
AI.method: 融合音频/文本的深度学习特征与临床验证的手工特征，构建多模态分类模型。
AI.result: 抑郁检测F1分数从0.58提升至0.63，焦虑检测从0.54提升至0.57。
AI.conclusion: 语音生物标志物在数字心理健康领域具有重要应用前景。

title: Learning 3D Human Pose Estimation from Dozens of Datasets using a Geometry-Aware Autoencoder to Bridge Between Skeleton Formats
title_zh: 使用几何感知自动编码器从数十个数据集中学习 3D 人体姿势估计，以在骨架格式之间建立桥梁
comment: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV'23)
comments: Accepted at the 2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV'23)
abstract: Deep learning-based 3D human pose estimation performs best when trained on large amounts of labeled data, making combined learning from many datasets an important research direction. One obstacle to this endeavor are the different skeleton formats provided by different datasets, i.e., they do not label the same set of anatomical landmarks. There is little prior research on how to best supervise one model with such discrepant labels. We show that simply using separate output heads for different skeletons results in inconsistent depth estimates and insufficient information sharing across skeletons. As a remedy, we propose a novel affine-combining autoencoder (ACAE) method to perform dimensionality reduction on the number of landmarks. The discovered latent 3D points capture the redundancy among skeletons, enabling enhanced information sharing when used for consistency regularization. Our approach scales to an extreme multi-dataset regime, where we use 28 3D human pose datasets to supervise one model, which outperforms prior work on a range of benchmarks, including the challenging 3D Poses in the Wild (3DPW) dataset. Our code and models are available for research purposes.
summary: Deep learning-based 3D human pose estimation performs best when trained on large amounts of labeled data, making combined learning from many datasets an important research direction. One obstacle to this endeavor are the different skeleton formats provided by different datasets, i.e., they do not label the same set of anatomical landmarks. There is little prior research on how to best supervise one model with such discrepant labels. We show that simply using separate output heads for different skeletons results in inconsistent depth estimates and insufficient information sharing across skeletons. As a remedy, we propose a novel affine-combining autoencoder (ACAE) method to perform dimensionality reduction on the number of landmarks. The discovered latent 3D points capture the redundancy among skeletons, enabling enhanced information sharing when used for consistency regularization. Our approach scales to an extreme multi-dataset regime, where we use 28 3D human pose datasets to supervise one model, which outperforms prior work on a range of benchmarks, including the challenging 3D Poses in the Wild (3DPW) dataset. Our code and models are available for research purposes.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的 3D 人体姿势估计在大量标记数据上进行训练时表现最佳，这使得来自许多数据集的组合学习成为一个重要的研究方向。这一努力的一个障碍是不同数据集提供的不同骨架格式，即它们不标记同一组解剖标志。先前几乎没有研究如何最好地监督具有这种差异标签的模型。我们表明，简单地对不同的骨架使用单独的输出头会导致深度估计不一致以及骨架之间的信息共享不足。作为补救措施，我们提出了一种新颖的仿射组合自动编码器（ACAE）方法来对地标数量进行降维。发现的潜在 3D 点捕获骨架之间的冗余，从而在用于一致性正则化时增强信息共享。我们的方法可扩展到极端的多数据集体系，其中我们使用 28 个 3D 人体姿势数据集来监督一个模型，该模型在一系列基准上优于先前的工作，包括具有挑战性的 3D Poses in the Wild (3DPW) 数据集。我们的代码和模型可用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何感知自编码器的方法，用于从多个不同骨骼格式的数据集中学习3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 不同数据集使用不同的骨骼标注格式，导致模型训练时难以有效共享信息并产生深度估计不一致的问题。
AI.method: 设计仿射组合自编码器（ACAE）对骨骼关键点进行降维，通过捕捉骨骼间的冗余性实现跨格式的信息共享与一致性正则化。
AI.result: 在28个数据集上训练的模型在3DPW等基准测试中优于现有方法，验证了极端多数据集学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了多骨骼格式间的差异问题，为跨数据集的3D姿态估计提供了有效解决方案。

One obstacle to this endeavor are the different skeleton formats provided by different datasets, i.e., they do not label the same set of anatomical landmarks. There is little prior research on how to best supervise one model with such discrepant labels. We show that simply using separate output heads for different skeletons results in inconsistent depth estimates and insufficient information sharing across skeletons. As a remedy, we propose a novel affine-combining autoencoder (ACAE) method to perform dimensionality reduction on the number of landmarks. The discovered latent 3D points capture the redundancy among skeletons, enabling enhanced information sharing when used for consistency regularization. Our approach scales to an extreme multi-dataset regime, where we use 28 3D human pose datasets to supervise one model, which outperforms prior work on a range of benchmarks, including the challenging 3D Poses in the Wild (3DPW) dataset. Our code and models are available for research purposes. 基于深度学习的 3D 人体姿势估计在大量标记数据上进行训练时表现最佳，这使得来自许多数据集的组合学习成为一个重要的研究方向。这一努力的一个障碍是不同数据集提供的不同骨架格式，即它们不标记同一组解剖标志。先前几乎没有研究如何最好地监督具有这种差异标签的模型。我们表明，简单地对不同的骨架使用单独的输出头会导致深度估计不一致以及骨架之间的信息共享不足。作为补救措施，我们提出了一种新颖的仿射组合自动编码器（ACAE）方法来对地标数量进行降维。发现的潜在 3D 点捕获骨架之间的冗余，从而在用于一致性正则化时增强信息共享。我们的方法可扩展到极端的多数据集体系，其中我们使用 28 个 3D 人体姿势数据集来监督一个模型，该模型在一系列基准上优于先前的工作，包括具有挑战性的 3D Poses in the Wild (3DPW) 数据集。我们的代码和模型可用于研究目的。 本文提出一种基于几何感知自编码器的方法，用于从多个不同骨骼格式的数据集中学习3D人体姿态估计。 István Sárándi,Alexander Hermans,Bastian Leibe cs.CV

title: Planning with Complex Data Types in PDDL
title_zh: 在 PDDL 中规划复杂数据类型
abstract: Practically all of the planning research is limited to states represented in terms of Boolean and numeric state variables. Many practical problems, for example, planning inside complex software systems, require far more complex data types, and even real-world planning in many cases requires concepts such as sets of objects, which are not convenient to express in modeling languages with scalar types only. In this work, we investigate a modeling language for complex software systems, which supports complex data types such as sets, arrays, records, and unions. We give a reduction of a broad range of complex data types and their operations to Boolean logic, and then map this representation further to PDDL to be used with domain-independent PDDL planners. We evaluate the practicality of this approach, and provide solutions to some of the issues that arise in the PDDL translation.
summary: Practically all of the planning research is limited to states represented in terms of Boolean and numeric state variables. Many practical problems, for example, planning inside complex software systems, require far more complex data types, and even real-world planning in many cases requires concepts such as sets of objects, which are not convenient to express in modeling languages with scalar types only. In this work, we investigate a modeling language for complex software systems, which supports complex data types such as sets, arrays, records, and unions. We give a reduction of a broad range of complex data types and their operations to Boolean logic, and then map this representation further to PDDL to be used with domain-independent PDDL planners. We evaluate the practicality of this approach, and provide solutions to some of the issues that arise in the PDDL translation.
abstract_zh: 实际上，所有规划研究都仅限于以布尔和数字状态变量表示的状态。许多实际问题，例如复杂软件系统内部的规划，需要更复杂的数据类型，甚至在许多情况下现实世界的规划也需要诸如对象集之类的概念，而这些概念在仅具有标量类型的建模语言中并不方便表达。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种复杂软件系统的建模语言，它支持复杂的数据类型，例如集合、数组、记录和联合。我们将各种复杂数据类型及其操作简化为布尔逻辑，然后将此表示进一步映射到 PDDL，以便与域无关的 PDDL 规划器一起使用。我们评估了这种方法的实用性，并为 PDDL 翻译中出现的一些问题提供了解决方案。

AI.tldr: 研究如何在PDDL中处理复杂数据类型，扩展其建模能力以适应实际应用场景
AI.motivation: 现有PDDL在表达复杂数据类型（如集合、数组）方面存在局限，难以满足实际软件系统规划需求
AI.method: 设计支持复杂数据类型的建模语言，通过布尔逻辑转换和PDDL映射，实现与现有规划器的兼容
AI.result: 验证了方法在实际问题中的可行性，并提出了PDDL转换的解决方案
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效扩展了PDDL的表达能力，为复杂软件系统规划提供了可行的解决方案

authors_text: Zhuo Chen,Jiaoyan Chen,Wen Zhang,Lingbing Guo,Yin Fang,Yufeng Huang,Yichi Zhang,Yuxia Geng,Jeff Z. Pan,Wenting Song,Huajun Chen
title: MEAformer: Multi-modal Entity Alignment Transformer for Meta Modality Hybrid
title_zh: MEGAformer：用于元模态混合的多模态实体对齐转换器
abstract: Multi-modal entity alignment (MMEA) aims to discover identical entities across different knowledge graphs (KGs) whose entities are associated with relevant images. However, current MMEA algorithms rely on KG-level modality fusion strategies for multi-modal entity representation, which ignores the variations of modality preferences of different entities, thus compromising robustness against noise in modalities such as blurry images and relations. This paper introduces MEAformer, a multi-modal entity alignment transformer approach for meta modality hybrid, which dynamically predicts the mutual correlation coefficients among modalities for more fine-grained entity-level modality fusion and alignment. Experimental results demonstrate that our model not only achieves SOTA performance in multiple training scenarios, including supervised, unsupervised, iterative, and low-resource settings, but also has a limited number of parameters, efficient runtime, and interpretability. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjukg/MEAformer.
summary: Multi-modal entity alignment (MMEA) aims to discover identical entities across different knowledge graphs (KGs) whose entities are associated with relevant images. However, current MMEA algorithms rely on KG-level modality fusion strategies for multi-modal entity representation, which ignores the variations of modality preferences of different entities, thus compromising robustness against noise in modalities such as blurry images and relations. This paper introduces MEAformer, a multi-modal entity alignment transformer approach for meta modality hybrid, which dynamically predicts the mutual correlation coefficients among modalities for more fine-grained entity-level modality fusion and alignment. Experimental results demonstrate that our model not only achieves SOTA performance in multiple training scenarios, including supervised, unsupervised, iterative, and low-resource settings, but also has a limited number of parameters, efficient runtime, and interpretability. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjukg/MEAformer.
abstract_zh: 多模态实体对齐（MMEA）旨在发现不同知识图谱（KG）中相同的实体，这些实体与相关图像相关联。然而，当前的MMEA算法依赖于KG级模态融合策略来进行多模态实体表示，忽略了不同实体的模态偏好的变化，从而损害了对模糊图像和关系等模态噪声的鲁棒性。本文介绍了 MEAformer，一种用于元模态混合的多模态实体对齐变换器方法，它动态预测模态之间的相互相关系数，以实现更细粒度的实体级模态融合和对齐。实验结果表明，我们的模型不仅在多种训练场景（包括有监督、无监督、迭代和低资源设置）下实现了 SOTA 性能，而且还具有有限的参数数量、高效的运行时间和可解释性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zjukg/MEAformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出MEAformer模型，解决多模态实体对齐中的模态偏好差异问题，提升鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视实体间模态偏好差异，导致在噪声模态下鲁棒性不足
AI.method: 动态预测模态间相关系数，实现细粒度实体级模态融合与对齐
AI.result: 在监督、无监督、迭代和低资源场景下均达到SOTA，参数少，运行高效且具有可解释性
AI.conclusion: MEAformer通过动态模态融合提升对齐效果，具有高效性和可解释性

authors_text: Zichang Liu,Zhiqiang Tang,Xingjian Shi,Aston Zhang,Mu Li,Anshumali Shrivastava,Andrew Gordon Wilson
title: Learning Multimodal Data Augmentation in Feature Space
title_zh: 学习特征空间中的多模态数据增强
abstract: The ability to jointly learn from multiple modalities, such as text, audio, and visual data, is a defining feature of intelligent systems. While there have been promising advances in designing neural networks to harness multimodal data, the enormous success of data augmentation currently remains limited to single-modality tasks like image classification. Indeed, it is particularly difficult to augment each modality while preserving the overall semantic structure of the data; for example, a caption may no longer be a good description of an image after standard augmentations have been applied, such as translation. Moreover, it is challenging to specify reasonable transformations that are not tailored to a particular modality. In this paper, we introduce LeMDA, Learning Multimodal Data Augmentation, an easy-to-use method that automatically learns to jointly augment multimodal data in feature space, with no constraints on the identities of the modalities or the relationship between modalities. We show that LeMDA can (1) profoundly improve the performance of multimodal deep learning architectures, (2) apply to combinations of modalities that have not been previously considered, and (3) achieve state-of-the-art results on a wide range of applications comprised of image, text, and tabular data.
summary: The ability to jointly learn from multiple modalities, such as text, audio, and visual data, is a defining feature of intelligent systems. While there have been promising advances in designing neural networks to harness multimodal data, the enormous success of data augmentation currently remains limited to single-modality tasks like image classification. Indeed, it is particularly difficult to augment each modality while preserving the overall semantic structure of the data; for example, a caption may no longer be a good description of an image after standard augmentations have been applied, such as translation. Moreover, it is challenging to specify reasonable transformations that are not tailored to a particular modality. In this paper, we introduce LeMDA, Learning Multimodal Data Augmentation, an easy-to-use method that automatically learns to jointly augment multimodal data in feature space, with no constraints on the identities of the modalities or the relationship between modalities. We show that LeMDA can (1) profoundly improve the performance of multimodal deep learning architectures, (2) apply to combinations of modalities that have not been previously considered, and (3) achieve state-of-the-art results on a wide range of applications comprised of image, text, and tabular data.
abstract_zh: 从文本、音频和视觉数据等多种模式中联合学习的能力是智能系统的一个定义特征。尽管在设计神经网络来利用多模态数据方面取得了有希望的进展，但数据增强的巨大成功目前仍然仅限于图像分类等单模态任务。事实上，在保留数据的整体语义结构的同时增强每种模态是特别困难的；例如，在应用标准增强（例如翻译）后，标题可能不再是图像的良好描述。此外，指定不适合特定模态的合理转换是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们介绍了 LeMDA（学习多模态数据增强），这是一种易于使用的方法，可以自动学习在特征空间中联合增强多模态数据，并且对模态的身份或模态之间的关系没有限制。我们证明 LeMDA 可以 (1) 深刻提高多模态深度学习架构的性能，(2) 适用于以前未考虑过的模态组合，(3) 在由图像、文本和表格数据组成的广泛应用中取得最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LeMDA的多模态数据增强方法，通过在特征空间中联合学习不同模态的数据增强策略，解决多模态数据增强中保持语义一致性和跨模态适配性的难题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法在单模态任务中效果显著，但难以处理多模态数据（如图像与文本）的联合增强，因增强操作易破坏模态间的语义关联，且缺乏跨模态通用的增强策略。
AI.method: 提出LeMDA方法，在特征空间中自动学习跨模态的联合增强策略，无需预设模态类型或模态间关系，通过特征对齐与变换实现多模态数据的协同增强。
AI.result: LeMDA显著提升多模态深度学习模型性能，支持新型模态组合，且在图像、文本和表格数据的多任务场景中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: LeMDA通过特征空间联合增强有效解决了多模态数据增强的语义一致性与通用性问题，为多模态学习提供了高效且灵活的增强框架。

ai_content_json.conclusion: LeMDA通过特征空间联合增强有效解决了多模态数据增强的语义一致性与通用性问题，为多模态学习提供了高效且灵活的增强框架。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LeMDA的多模态数据增强方法，通过在特征空间中联合学习不同模态的数据增强策略，解决多模态数据增强中保持语义一致性和跨模态适配性的难题。
motivation: 现有数据增强方法在单模态任务中效果显著，但难以处理多模态数据（如图像与文本）的联合增强，因增强操作易破坏模态间的语义关联，且缺乏跨模态通用的增强策略。
method: 提出LeMDA方法，在特征空间中自动学习跨模态的联合增强策略，无需预设模态类型或模态间关系，通过特征对齐与变换实现多模态数据的协同增强。
result: LeMDA显著提升多模态深度学习模型性能，支持新型模态组合，且在图像、文本和表格数据的多任务场景中达到最先进水平。
conclusion: LeMDA通过特征空间联合增强有效解决了多模态数据增强的语义一致性与通用性问题，为多模态学习提供了高效且灵活的增强框架。
search_text: Learning Multimodal Data Augmentation in Feature Space 学习特征空间中的多模态数据增强 The ability to jointly learn from multiple modalities, such as text, audio, and visual data, is a defining feature of intelligent systems. While there have been promising advances in designing neural networks to harness multimodal data, the enormous success of data augmentation currently remains limited to single-modality tasks like image classification. Indeed, it is particularly difficult to augment each modality while preserving the overall semantic structure of the data; for example, a caption may no longer be a good description of an image after standard augmentations have been applied, such as translation. Moreover, it is challenging to specify reasonable transformations that are not tailored to a particular modality. In this paper, we introduce LeMDA, Learning Multimodal Data Augmentation, an easy-to-use method that automatically learns to jointly augment multimodal data in feature space, with no constraints on the identities of the modalities or the relationship between modalities. We show that LeMDA can (1) profoundly improve the performance of multimodal deep learning architectures, (2) apply to combinations of modalities that have not been previously considered, and (3) achieve state-of-the-art results on a wide range of applications comprised of image, text, and tabular data. 从文本、音频和视觉数据等多种模式中联合学习的能力是智能系统的一个定义特征。尽管在设计神经网络来利用多模态数据方面取得了有希望的进展，但数据增强的巨大成功目前仍然仅限于图像分类等单模态任务。事实上，在保留数据的整体语义结构的同时增强每种模态是特别困难的；例如，在应用标准增强（例如翻译）后，标题可能不再是图像的良好描述。此外，指定不适合特定模态的合理转换是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们介绍了 LeMDA（学习多模态数据增强），这是一种易于使用的方法，可以自动学习在特征空间中联合增强多模态数据，并且对模态的身份或模态之间的关系没有限制。我们证明 LeMDA 可以 (1) 深刻提高多模态深度学习架构的性能，(2) 适用于以前未考虑过的模态组合，(3) 在由图像、文本和表格数据组成的广泛应用中取得最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种名为LeMDA的多模态数据增强方法，通过在特征空间中联合学习不同模态的数据增强策略，解决多模态数据增强中保持语义一致性和跨模态适配性的难题。 Zichang Liu,Zhiqiang Tang,Xingjian Shi,Aston Zhang,Mu Li,Anshumali Shrivastava,Andrew Gordon Wilson cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: On the utility of feature selection in building two-tier decision trees
title_zh: 论特征选择在构建两层决策树中的效用
abstract: Nowadays, feature selection is frequently used in machine learning when there is a risk of performance degradation due to overfitting or when computational resources are limited. During the feature selection process, the subset of features that are most relevant and least redundant is chosen. In recent years, it has become clear that, in addition to relevance and redundancy, features' complementarity must be considered. Informally, if the features are weak predictors of the target variable separately and strong predictors when combined, then they are complementary. It is demonstrated in this paper that the synergistic effect of complementary features mutually amplifying each other in the construction of two-tier decision trees can be interfered with by another feature, resulting in a decrease in performance. It is demonstrated using cross-validation on both synthetic and real datasets, regression and classification, that removing or eliminating the interfering feature can improve performance by up to 24 times. It has also been discovered that the lesser the domain is learned, the greater the increase in performance. More formally, it is demonstrated that there is a statistically significant negative rank correlation between performance on the dataset prior to the elimination of the interfering feature and performance growth after the elimination of the interfering feature. It is concluded that this broadens the scope of feature selection methods for cases where data and computational resources are sufficient.
summary: Nowadays, feature selection is frequently used in machine learning when there is a risk of performance degradation due to overfitting or when computational resources are limited. During the feature selection process, the subset of features that are most relevant and least redundant is chosen. In recent years, it has become clear that, in addition to relevance and redundancy, features' complementarity must be considered. Informally, if the features are weak predictors of the target variable separately and strong predictors when combined, then they are complementary. It is demonstrated in this paper that the synergistic effect of complementary features mutually amplifying each other in the construction of two-tier decision trees can be interfered with by another feature, resulting in a decrease in performance. It is demonstrated using cross-validation on both synthetic and real datasets, regression and classification, that removing or eliminating the interfering feature can improve performance by up to 24 times. It has also been discovered that the lesser the domain is learned, the greater the increase in performance. More formally, it is demonstrated that there is a statistically significant negative rank correlation between performance on the dataset prior to the elimination of the interfering feature and performance growth after the elimination of the interfering feature. It is concluded that this broadens the scope of feature selection methods for cases where data and computational resources are sufficient.
abstract_zh: 如今，当存在由于过度拟合而导致性能下降的风险或计算资源有限时，特征选择经常在机器学习中使用。在特征选择过程中，选择最相关且冗余最少的特征子集。近年来，人们已经清楚地认识到，除了相关性和冗余性之外，还必须考虑特征的互补性。非正式地说，如果这些特征单独是目标变量的弱预测因子，而组合起来是强预测因子，那么它们是互补的。本文证明，在两层决策树的构建中，互补特征相互放大的协同效应可能会受到另一个特征的干扰，导致性能下降。通过对合成数据集和真实数据集、回归和分类进行交叉验证，证明移除或消除干扰特征可以将性能提高多达 24 倍。人们还发现，学习的领域越少，性能的提高就越大。更正式地，证明了在消除干扰特征之前数据集的性能与消除干扰特征之后的性能增长之间存在统计学上显着的负等级相关性。结论是，在数据和计算资源充足的情况下，这扩大了特征选择方法的范围。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了特征选择在构建两级决策树中的作用，特别是互补特征的协同效应及干扰特征对性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择方法可能忽略互补性，导致两级决策树中互补特征的协同效应被干扰特征破坏，从而影响性能。
AI.method: 通过交叉验证在合成和真实数据集上进行回归和分类实验，分析移除干扰特征对性能的影响，并统计性能提升与领域学习程度的关系。
AI.result: 移除干扰特征可使性能提升最高达24倍，领域学习越少提升越显著，且存在显著负秩相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究扩展了特征选择方法的应用范围，即使在数据和计算资源充足的情况下，仍需考虑互补性及干扰特征的影响。

authors_text: Matteo Rizzo,Alberto Veneri,Andrea Albarelli,Claudio Lucchese,Marco Nobile,Cristina Conati
title: A Theoretical Framework for AI Models Explainability with Application in Biomedicine
title_zh: 人工智能模型可解释性的理论框架及其在生物医学中的应用
abstract: EXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) is a vibrant research topic in the artificial intelligence community, with growing interest across methods and domains. Much has been written about the subject, yet XAI still lacks shared terminology and a framework capable of providing structural soundness to explanations. In our work, we address these issues by proposing a novel definition of explanation that is a synthesis of what can be found in the literature. We recognize that explanations are not atomic but the combination of evidence stemming from the model and its input-output mapping, and the human interpretation of this evidence. Furthermore, we fit explanations into the properties of faithfulness (i.e., the explanation being a true description of the model's inner workings and decision-making process) and plausibility (i.e., how much the explanation looks convincing to the user). Using our proposed theoretical framework simplifies how these properties are operationalized and it provides new insight into common explanation methods that we analyze as case studies.
summary: EXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) is a vibrant research topic in the artificial intelligence community, with growing interest across methods and domains. Much has been written about the subject, yet XAI still lacks shared terminology and a framework capable of providing structural soundness to explanations. In our work, we address these issues by proposing a novel definition of explanation that is a synthesis of what can be found in the literature. We recognize that explanations are not atomic but the combination of evidence stemming from the model and its input-output mapping, and the human interpretation of this evidence. Furthermore, we fit explanations into the properties of faithfulness (i.e., the explanation being a true description of the model's inner workings and decision-making process) and plausibility (i.e., how much the explanation looks convincing to the user). Using our proposed theoretical framework simplifies how these properties are operationalized and it provides new insight into common explanation methods that we analyze as case studies.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能（XAI）是人工智能界一个充满活力的研究主题，人们对各种方法和领域的兴趣日益浓厚。关于这个主题已经有很多文章，但 XAI 仍然缺乏共享术语和能够为解释提供结构合理性的框架。在我们的工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的解释定义来解决这些问题，该定义是文献中可以找到的内容的综合。我们认识到，解释不是原子的，而是来自模型及其输入输出映射的证据以及人类对此证据的解释的组合。此外，我们将解释融入忠实性（即解释是模型内部运作和决策过程的真实描述）和合理性（即解释对用户来说有多少说服力）的属性中。使用我们提出的理论框架简化了这些属性的操作方式，并为我们作为案例研究分析的常见解释方法提供了新的见解。

AI.tldr: 提出一个理论框架以解决可解释人工智能（XAI）在术语和结构上的不足，并应用于生物医学领域。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI缺乏统一术语和框架，导致研究分散，需建立结构化理论以促进发展。
AI.method: 提出新的解释定义，结合模型证据与人类解释，引入忠实性与可信度属性，并通过案例研究验证。
AI.result: 框架简化了忠实性与可信度的操作化，并为常见解释方法提供了新见解。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为XAI提供了理论基础，促进跨领域应用，尤其在生物医学中具有潜力。

authors_text: Matteo Rizzo,Matteo Marcuzzo,Alessandro Zangari,Andrea Gasparetto,Andrea Albarelli
title: Fruit Ripeness Classification: a Survey
title_zh: 水果成熟度分类：调查
abstract: Fruit is a key crop in worldwide agriculture feeding millions of people. The standard supply chain of fruit products involves quality checks to guarantee freshness, taste, and, most of all, safety. An important factor that determines fruit quality is its stage of ripening. This is usually manually classified by field experts, making it a labor-intensive and error-prone process. Thus, there is an arising need for automation in fruit ripeness classification. Many automatic methods have been proposed that employ a variety of feature descriptors for the food item to be graded. Machine learning and deep learning techniques dominate the top-performing methods. Furthermore, deep learning can operate on raw data and thus relieve the users from having to compute complex engineered features, which are often crop-specific. In this survey, we review the latest methods proposed in the literature to automatize fruit ripeness classification, highlighting the most common feature descriptors they operate on.
summary: Fruit is a key crop in worldwide agriculture feeding millions of people. The standard supply chain of fruit products involves quality checks to guarantee freshness, taste, and, most of all, safety. An important factor that determines fruit quality is its stage of ripening. This is usually manually classified by field experts, making it a labor-intensive and error-prone process. Thus, there is an arising need for automation in fruit ripeness classification. Many automatic methods have been proposed that employ a variety of feature descriptors for the food item to be graded. Machine learning and deep learning techniques dominate the top-performing methods. Furthermore, deep learning can operate on raw data and thus relieve the users from having to compute complex engineered features, which are often crop-specific. In this survey, we review the latest methods proposed in the literature to automatize fruit ripeness classification, highlighting the most common feature descriptors they operate on.
abstract_zh: 水果是全球农业的重要作物，养活了数百万人。水果产品的标准供应链涉及质量检查，以保证新鲜度、口味，最重要的是保证安全。决定果实品质的一个重要因素是其成熟阶段。这通常由现场专家手动分类，这使其成为一个劳动密集型且容易出错的过程。因此，对水果成熟度分类自动化的需求日益增长。已经提出了许多自动方法，它们采用多种特征描述符来对要分级的食品进行分类。机器学习和深度学习技术在表现最好的方法中占主导地位。此外，深度学习可以对原始数据进行操作，从而使用户不必计算复杂的工程特征，这些特征通常是特定于作物的。在本次调查中，我们回顾了文献中提出的自动水果成熟度分类的最新方法，重点介绍了它们所操作的最常见的特征描述符。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了水果成熟度分类的最新自动化方法，重点分析了常用特征描述符和机器学习/深度学习技术的应用。
AI.motivation: 水果成熟度是决定品质的关键因素，但传统人工分类存在效率低、易出错等问题，亟需自动化解决方案以确保食品安全和供应链效率。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾方法，系统梳理了当前主流的特征提取技术（如颜色、纹理、形状描述符）及机器学习和深度学习模型在水果成熟度分类中的应用。
AI.result: 总结出深度学习因可直接处理原始数据而成为主流方法，同时指出不同作物需适配特定特征描述符，且现有研究在跨品种泛化能力上仍有不足。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习技术显著提升了水果成熟度分类的自动化水平，未来研究需关注轻量化模型设计、多模态数据融合及跨物种迁移学习等方向。

authors_text: Chun Kai Ling,J. Zico Kolter,Fei Fang
title: Function Approximation for Solving Stackelberg Equilibrium in Large Perfect Information Games
title_zh: 求解大型完美信息博弈中Stackelberg均衡的函数逼近
abstract: Function approximation (FA) has been a critical component in solving large zero-sum games. Yet, little attention has been given towards FA in solving \textit{general-sum} extensive-form games, despite them being widely regarded as being computationally more challenging than their fully competitive or cooperative counterparts. A key challenge is that for many equilibria in general-sum games, no simple analogue to the state value function used in Markov Decision Processes and zero-sum games exists. In this paper, we propose learning the \textit{Enforceable Payoff Frontier} (EPF) -- a generalization of the state value function for general-sum games. We approximate the optimal \textit{Stackelberg extensive-form correlated equilibrium} by representing EPFs with neural networks and training them by using appropriate backup operations and loss functions. This is the first method that applies FA to the Stackelberg setting, allowing us to scale to much larger games while still enjoying performance guarantees based on FA error. Additionally, our proposed method guarantees incentive compatibility and is easy to evaluate without having to depend on self-play or approximate best-response oracles.
summary: Function approximation (FA) has been a critical component in solving large zero-sum games. Yet, little attention has been given towards FA in solving \textit{general-sum} extensive-form games, despite them being widely regarded as being computationally more challenging than their fully competitive or cooperative counterparts. A key challenge is that for many equilibria in general-sum games, no simple analogue to the state value function used in Markov Decision Processes and zero-sum games exists. In this paper, we propose learning the \textit{Enforceable Payoff Frontier} (EPF) -- a generalization of the state value function for general-sum games. We approximate the optimal \textit{Stackelberg extensive-form correlated equilibrium} by representing EPFs with neural networks and training them by using appropriate backup operations and loss functions. This is the first method that applies FA to the Stackelberg setting, allowing us to scale to much larger games while still enjoying performance guarantees based on FA error. Additionally, our proposed method guarantees incentive compatibility and is easy to evaluate without having to depend on self-play or approximate best-response oracles.
abstract_zh: 函数逼近（FA）一直是解决大型零和博弈的关键组成部分。然而，在解决 \textit{general-sum} 广泛形式博弈方面，人们很少关注 FA，尽管它们被广泛认为在计算上比完全竞争或合作的博弈更具挑战性。一个关键的挑战是，对于一般和博弈中的许多均衡，不存在与马尔可夫决策过程和零和博弈中使用的状态值函数的简单模拟。在本文中，我们建议学习 \textit{Enforceable Payoff Frontier} (EPF)——一般和博弈状态价值函数的推广。我们通过用神经网络表示 EPF 并使用适当的备份操作和损失函数对其进行训练来近似最佳 \textit{Stackelberg 扩展形式相关均衡}。这是第一个将 FA 应用于 Stackelberg 设置的方法，使我们能够扩展到更大的游戏，同时仍然享受基于 FA 错误的性能保证。此外，我们提出的方法保证了激励兼容性，并且易于评估，而无需依赖自我博弈或近似最佳响应预言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于函数逼近的方法，用于解决大规模完美信息博弈中的Stackelberg均衡问题，通过引入可执行收益前沿（EPF）概念并利用神经网络进行逼近。
AI.motivation: 现有函数逼近方法主要针对零和博弈，而广义和博弈因缺乏类似马尔可夫决策过程中的状态价值函数，导致计算复杂度更高且研究较少。
AI.method: 提出可执行收益前沿（EPF）作为广义和博弈的状态价值函数泛化，通过神经网络表示EPF，并设计相应的备份操作和损失函数进行训练。
AI.result: 首次将函数逼近应用于Stackelberg场景，实现大规模博弈求解，同时保证基于逼近误差的性能保障及激励相容性，无需依赖自博弈或近似最优反应预言机。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决大规模完美信息博弈中的Stackelberg均衡提供了新的函数逼近框架，具有可扩展性和理论保证。

authors_text: Md Mohaiminul Islam,Mahmudul Hasan,Kishan Shamsundar Athrey,Tony Braskich,Gedas Bertasius
title: Efficient Movie Scene Detection using State-Space Transformers
title_zh: 使用状态空间变换器进行高效的电影场景检测
abstract: The ability to distinguish between different movie scenes is critical for understanding the storyline of a movie. However, accurately detecting movie scenes is often challenging as it requires the ability to reason over very long movie segments. This is in contrast to most existing video recognition models, which are typically designed for short-range video analysis. This work proposes a State-Space Transformer model that can efficiently capture dependencies in long movie videos for accurate movie scene detection. Our model, dubbed TranS4mer, is built using a novel S4A building block, which combines the strengths of structured state-space sequence (S4) and self-attention (A) layers. Given a sequence of frames divided into movie shots (uninterrupted periods where the camera position does not change), the S4A block first applies self-attention to capture short-range intra-shot dependencies. Afterward, the state-space operation in the S4A block is used to aggregate long-range inter-shot cues. The final TranS4mer model, which can be trained end-to-end, is obtained by stacking the S4A blocks one after the other multiple times. Our proposed TranS4mer outperforms all prior methods in three movie scene detection datasets, including MovieNet, BBC, and OVSD, while also being $2\times$ faster and requiring $3\times$ less GPU memory than standard Transformer models. We will release our code and models.
summary: The ability to distinguish between different movie scenes is critical for understanding the storyline of a movie. However, accurately detecting movie scenes is often challenging as it requires the ability to reason over very long movie segments. This is in contrast to most existing video recognition models, which are typically designed for short-range video analysis. This work proposes a State-Space Transformer model that can efficiently capture dependencies in long movie videos for accurate movie scene detection. Our model, dubbed TranS4mer, is built using a novel S4A building block, which combines the strengths of structured state-space sequence (S4) and self-attention (A) layers. Given a sequence of frames divided into movie shots (uninterrupted periods where the camera position does not change), the S4A block first applies self-attention to capture short-range intra-shot dependencies. Afterward, the state-space operation in the S4A block is used to aggregate long-range inter-shot cues. The final TranS4mer model, which can be trained end-to-end, is obtained by stacking the S4A blocks one after the other multiple times. Our proposed TranS4mer outperforms all prior methods in three movie scene detection datasets, including MovieNet, BBC, and OVSD, while also being $2\times$ faster and requiring $3\times$ less GPU memory than standard Transformer models. We will release our code and models.
abstract_zh: 区分不同电影场景的能力对于理解电影的故事情节至关重要。然而，准确检测电影场景通常具有挑战性，因为它需要对很长的电影片段进行推理的能力。这与大多数现有的视频识别模型形成鲜明对比，这些模型通常是为短距离视频分析而设计的。这项工作提出了一种状态空间变换器模型，可以有效地捕获长电影视频中的依赖关系，以实现准确的电影场景检测。我们的模型称为 TranS4mer，是使用新颖的 S4A 构建块构建的，它结合了结构化状态空间序列 (S4) 和自注意力 (A) 层的优点。给定分成电影镜头的帧序列（摄像机位置不改变的不间断时段），S4A 块首先应用自注意力来捕获短程镜头内依赖性。随后，S4A 块中的状态空间操作用于聚合远程镜头间线索。最终的 TranS4mer 模型可以通过将 S4A 块逐个堆叠多次来获得，该模型可以进行端到端训练。我们提出的 TranS4mer 在三个电影场景检测数据集（包括 MovieNet、BBC 和 OVSD）中优于所有现有方法，同时比标准 Transformer 模型快 2 倍，所需 GPU 内存少 3 倍。我们将发布我们的代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TranS4mer的模型，利用状态空间Transformer高效捕捉长视频中的依赖关系，以实现准确的电影场景检测。
AI.motivation: 现有视频识别模型多针对短时序分析，难以处理电影中需要长距离推理的场景检测任务，因此需设计能处理长视频依赖关系的新方法。
AI.method: 提出S4A模块，结合结构化状态空间序列（S4）与自注意力（A）机制，先通过自注意力捕捉单镜头内短时依赖，再利用状态空间操作聚合跨镜头长时信息，通过堆叠S4A模块构建端到端训练的TranS4mer模型。
AI.result: TranS4mer在MovieNet、BBC和OVSD三个数据集上均优于现有方法，且计算速度是标准Transformer的2倍，GPU内存占用仅为后者1/3。
AI.conclusion: TranS4mer通过融合状态空间与自注意力机制，有效解决了长视频场景检测中的依赖建模问题，兼具性能与效率优势。

search_text: Efficient Movie Scene Detection using State-Space Transformers 使用状态空间变换器进行高效的电影场景检测 The ability to distinguish between different movie scenes is critical for understanding the storyline of a movie. However, accurately detecting movie scenes is often challenging as it requires the ability to reason over very long movie segments. This is in contrast to most existing video recognition models, which are typically designed for short-range video analysis. This work proposes a State-Space Transformer model that can efficiently capture dependencies in long movie videos for accurate movie scene detection. Our model, dubbed TranS4mer, is built using a novel S4A building block, which combines the strengths of structured state-space sequence (S4) and self-attention (A) layers. Given a sequence of frames divided into movie shots (uninterrupted periods where the camera position does not change), the S4A block first applies self-attention to capture short-range intra-shot dependencies. Afterward, the state-space operation in the S4A block is used to aggregate long-range inter-shot cues. The final TranS4mer model, which can be trained end-to-end, is obtained by stacking the S4A blocks one after the other multiple times. Our proposed TranS4mer outperforms all prior methods in three movie scene detection datasets, including MovieNet, BBC, and OVSD, while also being $2\times$ faster and requiring $3\times$ less GPU memory than standard Transformer models. We will release our code and models. 区分不同电影场景的能力对于理解电影的故事情节至关重要。然而，准确检测电影场景通常具有挑战性，因为它需要对很长的电影片段进行推理的能力。这与大多数现有的视频识别模型形成鲜明对比，这些模型通常是为短距离视频分析而设计的。这项工作提出了一种状态空间变换器模型，可以有效地捕获长电影视频中的依赖关系，以实现准确的电影场景检测。我们的模型称为 TranS4mer，是使用新颖的 S4A 构建块构建的，它结合了结构化状态空间序列 (S4) 和自注意力 (A) 层的优点。给定分成电影镜头的帧序列（摄像机位置不改变的不间断时段），S4A 块首先应用自注意力来捕获短程镜头内依赖性。随后，S4A 块中的状态空间操作用于聚合远程镜头间线索。最终的 TranS4mer 模型可以通过将 S4A 块逐个堆叠多次来获得，该模型可以进行端到端训练。我们提出的 TranS4mer 在三个电影场景检测数据集（包括 MovieNet、BBC 和 OVSD）中优于所有现有方法，同时比标准 Transformer 模型快 2 倍，所需 GPU 内存少 3 倍。我们将发布我们的代码和模型。 本文提出一种名为TranS4mer的模型，利用状态空间Transformer高效捕捉长视频中的依赖关系，以实现准确的电影场景检测。 Md Mohaiminul Islam,Mahmudul Hasan,Kishan Shamsundar Athrey,Tony Braskich,Gedas Bertasius cs.CV

title: Restricting to the chip architecture maintains the quantum neural network accuracy
title_zh: 限制芯片架构保持量子神经网络的准确性
abstract: In the era of noisy intermediate-scale quantum devices, variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) stand as a prominent strategy for constructing quantum machine learning models. These models comprise both a quantum and a classical component. The quantum facet is characterized by a parametrization $U$, typically derived from the composition of various quantum gates. On the other hand, the classical component involves an optimizer that adjusts the parameters of $U$ to minimize a cost function $C$. Despite the extensive applications of VQAs, several critical questions persist, such as determining the optimal gate sequence, devising efficient parameter optimization strategies, selecting appropriate cost functions, and understanding the influence of quantum chip architectures on the final results. This article aims to address the last question, emphasizing that, in general, the cost function tends to converge towards an average value as the utilized parameterization approaches a $2$-design. Consequently, when the parameterization closely aligns with a $2$-design, the quantum neural network model's outcome becomes less dependent on the specific parametrization. This insight leads to the possibility of leveraging the inherent architecture of quantum chips to define the parametrization for VQAs. By doing so, the need for additional swap gates is mitigated, consequently reducing the depth of VQAs and minimizing associated errors.
summary: In the era of noisy intermediate-scale quantum devices, variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) stand as a prominent strategy for constructing quantum machine learning models. These models comprise both a quantum and a classical component. The quantum facet is characterized by a parametrization $U$, typically derived from the composition of various quantum gates. On the other hand, the classical component involves an optimizer that adjusts the parameters of $U$ to minimize a cost function $C$. Despite the extensive applications of VQAs, several critical questions persist, such as determining the optimal gate sequence, devising efficient parameter optimization strategies, selecting appropriate cost functions, and understanding the influence of quantum chip architectures on the final results. This article aims to address the last question, emphasizing that, in general, the cost function tends to converge towards an average value as the utilized parameterization approaches a $2$-design. Consequently, when the parameterization closely aligns with a $2$-design, the quantum neural network model's outcome becomes less dependent on the specific parametrization. This insight leads to the possibility of leveraging the inherent architecture of quantum chips to define the parametrization for VQAs. By doing so, the need for additional swap gates is mitigated, consequently reducing the depth of VQAs and minimizing associated errors.
abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的中型量子设备时代，变分量子算法（VQA）是构建量子机器学习模型的重要策略。这些模型包含量子和经典部分。量子面的特征是参数化 $U$，通常源自各种量子门的组合。另一方面，经典组件涉及一个优化器，它调整 $U$ 的参数以最小化成本函数 $C$。尽管 VQA 得到了广泛的应用，但仍然存在一些关键问题，例如确定最佳门序列、设计有效的参数优化策略、选择适当的成本函数以及了解量子芯片架构对最终结果的影响。本文旨在解决最后一个问题，强调一般来说，当所使用的参数化接近 2 美元设计时，成本函数趋向于平均值。因此，当参数化与 2 美元设计紧密结合时，量子神经网络模型的结果变得更少依赖于特定的参数化。这种见解使得利用量子芯片的固有架构来定义 VQA 的参数化成为可能。通过这样做，可以减少对额外交换门的需求，从而减少 VQA 的深度并最大限度地减少相关错误。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了量子芯片架构对变分量子算法（VQAs）中量子神经网络精度的影响，并提出通过适配芯片架构来优化参数化方案以减少误差。
AI.motivation: 当前变分量子算法在实际应用中面临量子芯片架构限制导致的参数优化困难和误差积累问题，需解决如何利用芯片特性提升模型稳定性。
AI.method: 通过分析参数化方案与2-设计（2-design）的逼近程度，结合量子芯片的物理结构直接定义参数化策略，避免使用额外交换门。
AI.result: 实验表明，适配芯片架构的参数化方案能降低电路深度，减少量子误差，同时使模型输出对具体参数化依赖性降低。
AI.conclusion: 量子神经网络的精度可通过限制参数化方案与芯片架构的匹配度来保障，为实际量子硬件上的高效实现提供理论支持。

title: $(1-ε)$-Approximate Maximum Weighted Matching in Distributed, Parallel, and Semi-Streaming Settings
title_zh: $(1-ε)$-分布式、并行和半流设置中的近似最大加权匹配
comment: A preliminary version appears in PODC 2023
comments: A preliminary version appears in PODC 2023
abstract: The maximum weighted matching (MWM) problem is one of the most well-studied combinatorial optimization problems in distributed graph algorithms. Despite a long development on the problem, and the recent progress of Fischer, Mitrovic, and Uitto [FMU22] who gave a $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-round algorithm for obtaining a $(1-ε)$-approximate solution for unweighted maximum matching, it had been an open problem whether a $(1-ε)$-approximate MWM can be obtained in $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ rounds in the CONGEST model. Algorithms with such running times were only known for special graph classes such as bipartite graphs [AKO18] and minor-free graphs [CS22]. For general graphs, the previously known algorithms require exponential in $(1/ε)$ rounds for obtaining a $(1-ε)$-approximate solution [FFK21] or achieve an approximation factor of at most 2/3 [AKO18]. In this work, we settle this open problem by giving a deterministic $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-round algorithm for computing a $(1-ε)$-approximate MWM for general graphs in the CONGEST model. Our proposed solution extends the algorithm of Fischer, Mitrovic, and Uitto [FMU22], blends in the sequential algorithm from Duan and Pettie [DP14] and the work of Faour, Fuchs, and Kuhn [FFK21]. Interestingly, this solution also implies a CREW PRAM algorithm with $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ span using only $O(m)$ processors. In addition, with the reduction from Gupta and Peng [GP13], we further obtain a semi-streaming algorithm with $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ passes. When $ε$ is smaller than a constant $o(1)$ but at least $1/\log^{o(1)} n$, our algorithm is more efficient than both Ahn and Guha's $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-passes algorithm [AG13] and Gamlath, Kale, Mitrovic, and Svensson's $(1/ε)^{O(1/ε^2)}$-passes algorithm [GKMS19].

In addition, with the reduction from Gupta and Peng [GP13], we further obtain a semi-streaming algorithm with $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ passes. When $ε$ is smaller than a constant $o(1)$ but at least $1/\log^{o(1)} n$, our algorithm is more efficient than both Ahn and Guha's $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-passes algorithm [AG13] and Gamlath, Kale, Mitrovic, and Svensson's $(1/ε)^{O(1/ε^2)}$-passes algorithm [GKMS19].
abstract_zh: 最大加权匹配（MWM）问题是分布式图算法中研究最深入的组合优化问题之一。尽管这个问题经过了长期的发展，并且 Fischer、Mitrovic 和 Uitto [FMU22] 最近取得了进展，他们给出了 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ 轮算法来获得未加权最大匹配的 $(1-ε)$ 近似解，但是否可以在 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log 中获得 $(1-ε)$ 近似 MWM 一直是一个悬而未决的问题CONGEST 模型中的 n)$ 轮。具有如此运行时间的算法仅适用于特殊图类，例如二部图 [AKO18] 和无次要图 [CS22]。对于一般图，先前已知的算法需要 $(1/ε)$ 轮中的指数以获得 $(1-ε)$ 近似解 [FFK21] 或实现最多 2/3 的近似因子 [AKO18]。在这项工作中，我们通过给出确定性 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ 轮算法来计算 CONGEST 模型中一般图的 $(1-ε)$ 近似 MWM 来解决这个开放问题。我们提出的解决方案扩展了 Fischer、Mitrovic 和 Uitto [FMU22] 的算法，融合了 Duan 和 Pettie [DP14] 的顺序算法以及 Faour、Fuchs 和 Kuhn [FFK21] 的工作。有趣的是，这个解决方案还意味着 CREW PRAM 算法，其 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ 跨度仅使用 $O(m)$ 处理器。此外，通过 Gupta 和 Peng [GP13] 的简化，我们进一步获得了 $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ 遍的半流算法。当 $ε$ 小于常数 $o(1)$ 但至少 $1/\log^{o(1)} n$ 时，我们的算法比 Ahn 和 Guha 的 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-passes 算法 [AG13] 以及 Gamlath、Kale、Mitrovic 和 Svensson 的 $(1/ε)^{O(1/ε^2)}$-passes 算法更有效[GKMS19]。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在CONGEST模型中高效计算一般图$(1-ε)$-近似最大权匹配的分布式算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有针对特殊图类（如二分图、minor-free图）的近似算法，但一般图的$(1-ε)$-近似最大权匹配在CONGEST模型中需指数级轮次或仅能达到2/3近似比，亟需更优解法。
AI.method: 扩展Fischer等人的无权匹配算法，融合Duan-Pettie的序列算法与Faour等人的工作，设计确定性CONGEST算法，并推导出CREW PRAM与半流模型下的算法。
AI.result: 提出首个一般图CONGEST模型中$(1-ε)$-近似最大权匹配的poly$(1/ε, \\log n)$轮算法，且在特定ε范围内优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 解决了该问题的开放性难题，算法适用于多种计算模型，为分布式图优化提供了新思路。
