search_text: $(1-ε)$-Approximate Maximum Weighted Matching in Distributed, Parallel, and Semi-Streaming Settings $(1-ε)$-分布式、并行和半流设置中的近似最大加权匹配 The maximum weighted matching (MWM) problem is one of the most well-studied combinatorial optimization problems in distributed graph algorithms. Despite a long development on the problem, and the recent progress of Fischer, Mitrovic, and Uitto [FMU22] who gave a $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-round algorithm for obtaining a $(1-ε)$-approximate solution for unweighted maximum matching, it had been an open problem whether a $(1-ε)$-approximate MWM can be obtained in $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ rounds in the CONGEST model. Algorithms with such running times were only known for special graph classes such as bipartite graphs [AKO18] and minor-free graphs [CS22]. For general graphs, the previously known algorithms require exponential in $(1/ε)$ rounds for obtaining a $(1-ε)$-approximate solution [FFK21] or achieve an approximation factor of at most 2/3 [AKO18]. In this work, we settle this open problem by giving a deterministic $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-round algorithm for computing a $(1-ε)$-approximate MWM for general graphs in the CONGEST model. Our proposed solution extends the algorithm of Fischer, Mitrovic, and Uitto [FMU22], blends in the sequential algorithm from Duan and Pettie [DP14] and the work of Faour, Fuchs, and Kuhn [FFK21]. Interestingly, this solution also implies a CREW PRAM algorithm with $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ span using only $O(m)$ processors. In addition, with the reduction from Gupta and Peng [GP13], we further obtain a semi-streaming algorithm with $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ passes. When $ε$ is smaller than a constant $o(1)$ but at least $1/\log^{o(1)} n$, our algorithm is more efficient than both Ahn and Guha's $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-passes algorithm [AG13] and Gamlath, Kale, Mitrovic, and Svensson's $(1/ε)^{O(1/ε^2)}$-passes algorithm [GKMS19]. 最大加权匹配（MWM）问题是分布式图算法中研究最深入的组合优化问题之一。尽管这个问题经过了长期的发展，并且 Fischer、Mitrovic 和 Uitto [FMU22] 最近取得了进展，他们给出了 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ 轮算法来获得未加权最大匹配的 $(1-ε)$ 近似解，但是否可以在 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log 中获得 $(1-ε)$ 近似 MWM 一直是一个悬而未决的问题CONGEST 模型中的 n)$ 轮。具有如此运行时间的算法仅适用于特殊图类，例如二部图 [AKO18] 和无次要图 [CS22]。对于一般图，先前已知的算法需要 $(1/ε)$ 轮中的指数以获得 $(1-ε)$ 近似解 [FFK21] 或实现最多 2/3 的近似因子 [AKO18]。在这项工作中，我们通过给出确定性 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ 轮算法来计算 CONGEST 模型中一般图的 $(1-ε)$ 近似 MWM 来解决这个开放问题。我们提出的解决方案扩展了 Fischer、Mitrovic 和 Uitto [FMU22] 的算法，融合了 Duan 和 Pettie [DP14] 的顺序算法以及 Faour、Fuchs 和 Kuhn [FFK21] 的工作。有趣的是，这个解决方案还意味着 CREW PRAM 算法，其 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$ 跨度仅使用 $O(m)$ 处理器。此外，通过 Gupta 和 Peng [GP13] 的简化，我们进一步获得了 $\text{poly}(1/ε)$ 遍的半流算法。当 $ε$ 小于常数 $o(1)$ 但至少 $1/\log^{o(1)} n$ 时，我们的算法比 Ahn 和 Guha 的 $\text{poly}(1/ε, \log n)$-passes 算法 [AG13] 以及 Gamlath、Kale、Mitrovic 和 Svensson 的 $(1/ε)^{O(1/ε^2)}$-passes 算法更有效[GKMS19]。 本文提出了一种在CONGEST模型中高效计算一般图$(1-ε)$-近似最大权匹配的分布式算法。 Shang-En Huang,Hsin-Hao Su cs.DC,cs.DS

title: Cross Version Defect Prediction with Class Dependency Embeddings
title_zh: 使用类依赖嵌入进行跨版本缺陷预测
abstract: Software Defect Prediction aims at predicting which software modules are the most probable to contain defects. The idea behind this approach is to save time during the development process by helping find bugs early. Defect Prediction models are based on historical data. Specifically, one can use data collected from past software distributions, or Versions, of the same target application under analysis. Defect Prediction based on past versions is called Cross Version Defect Prediction (CVDP). Traditionally, Static Code Metrics are used to predict defects. In this work, we use the Class Dependency Network (CDN) as another predictor for defects, combined with static code metrics. CDN data contains structural information about the target application being analyzed. Usually, CDN data is analyzed using different handcrafted network measures, like Social Network metrics. Our approach uses network embedding techniques to leverage CDN information without having to build the metrics manually. In order to use the embeddings between versions, we incorporate different embedding alignment techniques. To evaluate our approach, we performed experiments on 24 software release pairs and compared it against several benchmark methods. In these experiments, we analyzed the performance of two different graph embedding techniques, three anchor selection approaches, and two alignment techniques. We also built a meta-model based on two different embeddings and achieved a statistically significant improvement in AUC of 4.7% (p < 0.002) over the baseline method.
summary: Software Defect Prediction aims at predicting which software modules are the most probable to contain defects. The idea behind this approach is to save time during the development process by helping find bugs early. Defect Prediction models are based on historical data. Specifically, one can use data collected from past software distributions, or Versions, of the same target application under analysis. Defect Prediction based on past versions is called Cross Version Defect Prediction (CVDP). Traditionally, Static Code Metrics are used to predict defects. In this work, we use the Class Dependency Network (CDN) as another predictor for defects, combined with static code metrics. CDN data contains structural information about the target application being analyzed. Usually, CDN data is analyzed using different handcrafted network measures, like Social Network metrics. Our approach uses network embedding techniques to leverage CDN information without having to build the metrics manually. In order to use the embeddings between versions, we incorporate different embedding alignment techniques. To evaluate our approach, we performed experiments on 24 software release pairs and compared it against several benchmark methods. In these experiments, we analyzed the performance of two different graph embedding techniques, three anchor selection approaches, and two alignment techniques. We also built a meta-model based on two different embeddings and achieved a statistically significant improvement in AUC of 4.7% (p < 0.002) over the baseline method.
abstract_zh: Software Defect Prediction aims at predicting which software modules are the most probable to contain defects.这种方法背后的想法是通过帮助尽早发现错误来节省开发过程中的时间。 Defect Prediction models are based on historical data.具体来说，可以使用从所分析的同一目标应用程序的过去软件发行版或版本中收集的数据。基于过去版本的缺陷预测称为跨版本缺陷预测（CVDP）。传统上，静态代码度量用于预测缺陷。 In this work, we use the Class Dependency Network (CDN) as another predictor for defects, combined with static code metrics. CDN 数据包含有关正在分析的目标应用程序的结构信息。通常，CDN 数据是使用不同的手工网络度量（例如社交网络指标）进行分析的。我们的方法使用网络嵌入技术来利用 CDN 信息，而无需手动构建指标。为了使用版本之间的嵌入，我们采用了不同的嵌入对齐技术。为了评估我们的方法，我们对 24 个软件版本对进行了实验，并将其与几种基准方法进行了比较。在这些实验中，我们分析了两种不同的图嵌入技术、三种锚选择方法和两种对齐技术的性能。我们还基于两种不同的嵌入构建了一个元模型，并在 AUC 上实现了比基线方法显着的 4.7% (p < 0.002) 改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合类依赖网络嵌入与静态代码度量的跨版本缺陷预测方法，以提升软件模块缺陷检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统缺陷预测依赖静态代码度量，难以捕捉软件结构的复杂依赖关系。通过类依赖网络（CDN）嵌入可提取结构化信息，但需解决跨版本嵌入对齐问题。
AI.method: 利用网络嵌入技术提取CDN结构信息，结合静态代码度量，并采用嵌入对齐技术实现跨版本数据融合。实验对比了两种图嵌入技术、三种锚点选择方法和两种对齐技术，构建元模型提升预测性能。
AI.result: 在24个软件版本对上实验表明，元模型在AUC指标上较基线方法提升4.7%（p<0.002），验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于CDN嵌入的跨版本缺陷预测方法通过结构化信息与对齐技术有效提升了预测性能，为软件质量保障提供了新思路。

authors_text: Arjun Krishna,Zulfiqar Zaidi,Letian Chen,Rohan Paleja,Esmaeil Seraj,Matthew Gombolay
title: Utilizing Human Feedback for Primitive Optimization in Wheelchair Tennis
title_zh: 利用人类反馈进行轮椅网球的原始优化
comment: Workshop paper at Learning for Agile Robotics Workshop, CoRL 2022
comments: Workshop paper at Learning for Agile Robotics Workshop, CoRL 2022
abstract: Agile robotics presents a difficult challenge with robots moving at high speeds requiring precise and low-latency sensing and control. Creating agile motion that accomplishes the task at hand while being safe to execute is a key requirement for agile robots to gain human trust. This requires designing new approaches that are flexible and maintain knowledge over world constraints. In this paper, we consider the problem of building a flexible and adaptive controller for a challenging agile mobile manipulation task of hitting ground strokes on a wheelchair tennis robot. We propose and evaluate an extension to work done on learning striking behaviors using a probabilistic movement primitive (ProMP) framework by (1) demonstrating the safe execution of learned primitives on an agile mobile manipulator setup, and (2) proposing an online primitive refinement procedure that utilizes evaluative feedback from humans on the executed trajectories.
summary: Agile robotics presents a difficult challenge with robots moving at high speeds requiring precise and low-latency sensing and control. Creating agile motion that accomplishes the task at hand while being safe to execute is a key requirement for agile robots to gain human trust. This requires designing new approaches that are flexible and maintain knowledge over world constraints. In this paper, we consider the problem of building a flexible and adaptive controller for a challenging agile mobile manipulation task of hitting ground strokes on a wheelchair tennis robot. We propose and evaluate an extension to work done on learning striking behaviors using a probabilistic movement primitive (ProMP) framework by (1) demonstrating the safe execution of learned primitives on an agile mobile manipulator setup, and (2) proposing an online primitive refinement procedure that utilizes evaluative feedback from humans on the executed trajectories.
abstract_zh: 敏捷机器人技术提出了一项艰巨的挑战，机器人高速移动，需要精确和低延迟的传感和控制。创建灵活的运动来完成手头的任务，同时安全地执行是敏捷机器人赢得人类信任的关键要求。这需要设计灵活的新方法并保持对世界限制的了解。在本文中，我们考虑了为轮椅网球机器人击球这一具有挑战性的敏捷移动操纵任务构建灵活的自适应控制器的问题。我们提出并评估了使用概率运动基元（ProMP）框架学习打击行为的扩展，方法是（1）在敏捷的移动操纵器设置上演示学习基元的安全执行，以及（2）提出一种在线基元细化程序，该程序利用人类对执行轨迹的评估反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人类反馈优化运动原语的方法，用于轮椅网球机器人击球任务的灵活自适应控制。
AI.motivation: 敏捷机器人需在高速运动中实现安全精准控制，传统方法难以兼顾灵活性与安全性，需引入人类反馈提升适应性。
AI.method: 扩展概率运动原语框架，通过演示安全执行击球动作，并设计在线优化机制利用人类对轨迹的实时评估反馈调整原语参数。
AI.result: 在轮椅网球机器人上验证了方法有效性，实现了安全击球动作生成与人类反馈驱动的动态优化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过人类反馈优化运动原语，提升了敏捷机器人任务执行的安全性与灵活性，为复杂场景下人机协作控制提供了新思路。

search_text: Utilizing Human Feedback for Primitive Optimization in Wheelchair Tennis 利用人类反馈进行轮椅网球的原始优化 Agile robotics presents a difficult challenge with robots moving at high speeds requiring precise and low-latency sensing and control. Creating agile motion that accomplishes the task at hand while being safe to execute is a key requirement for agile robots to gain human trust. This requires designing new approaches that are flexible and maintain knowledge over world constraints. In this paper, we consider the problem of building a flexible and adaptive controller for a challenging agile mobile manipulation task of hitting ground strokes on a wheelchair tennis robot. We propose and evaluate an extension to work done on learning striking behaviors using a probabilistic movement primitive (ProMP) framework by (1) demonstrating the safe execution of learned primitives on an agile mobile manipulator setup, and (2) proposing an online primitive refinement procedure that utilizes evaluative feedback from humans on the executed trajectories. 敏捷机器人技术提出了一项艰巨的挑战，机器人高速移动，需要精确和低延迟的传感和控制。创建灵活的运动来完成手头的任务，同时安全地执行是敏捷机器人赢得人类信任的关键要求。这需要设计灵活的新方法并保持对世界限制的了解。在本文中，我们考虑了为轮椅网球机器人击球这一具有挑战性的敏捷移动操纵任务构建灵活的自适应控制器的问题。我们提出并评估了使用概率运动基元（ProMP）框架学习打击行为的扩展，方法是（1）在敏捷的移动操纵器设置上演示学习基元的安全执行，以及（2）提出一种在线基元细化程序，该程序利用人类对执行轨迹的评估反馈。 本文提出了一种结合人类反馈优化运动原语的方法，用于轮椅网球机器人击球任务的灵活自适应控制。 Arjun Krishna,Zulfiqar Zaidi,Letian Chen,Rohan Paleja,Esmaeil Seraj,Matthew Gombolay cs.RO

title: GPT Takes the Bar Exam
title_zh: GPT 参加律师资格考试
abstract: Nearly all jurisdictions in the United States require a professional license exam, commonly referred to as "the Bar Exam," as a precondition for law practice. To even sit for the exam, most jurisdictions require that an applicant completes at least seven years of post-secondary education, including three years at an accredited law school. In addition, most test-takers also undergo weeks to months of further, exam-specific preparation. Despite this significant investment of time and capital, approximately one in five test-takers still score under the rate required to pass the exam on their first try. In the face of a complex task that requires such depth of knowledge, what, then, should we expect of the state of the art in "AI?" In this research, we document our experimental evaluation of the performance of OpenAI's `text-davinci-003` model, often-referred to as GPT-3.5, on the multistate multiple choice (MBE) section of the exam. While we find no benefit in fine-tuning over GPT-3.5's zero-shot performance at the scale of our training data, we do find that hyperparameter optimization and prompt engineering positively impacted GPT-3.5's zero-shot performance. For best prompt and parameters, GPT-3.5 achieves a headline correct rate of 50.3% on a complete NCBE MBE practice exam, significantly in excess of the 25% baseline guessing rate, and performs at a passing rate for both Evidence and Torts. GPT-3.5's ranking of responses is also highly-correlated with correctness; its top two and top three choices are correct 71% and 88% of the time, respectively, indicating very strong non-entailment performance. While our ability to interpret these results is limited by nascent scientific understanding of LLMs and the proprietary nature of GPT, we believe that these results strongly suggest that an LLM will pass the MBE component of the Bar Exam in the near future.

To even sit for the exam, most jurisdictions require that an applicant completes at least seven years of post-secondary education, including three years at an accredited law school. In addition, most test-takers also undergo weeks to months of further, exam-specific preparation. Despite this significant investment of time and capital, approximately one in five test-takers still score under the rate required to pass the exam on their first try. In the face of a complex task that requires such depth of knowledge, what, then, should we expect of the state of the art in "AI?" In this research, we document our experimental evaluation of the performance of OpenAI's `text-davinci-003` model, often-referred to as GPT-3.5, on the multistate multiple choice (MBE) section of the exam. While we find no benefit in fine-tuning over GPT-3.5's zero-shot performance at the scale of our training data, we do find that hyperparameter optimization and prompt engineering positively impacted GPT-3.5's zero-shot performance. For best prompt and parameters, GPT-3.5 achieves a headline correct rate of 50.3% on a complete NCBE MBE practice exam, significantly in excess of the 25% baseline guessing rate, and performs at a passing rate for both Evidence and Torts. GPT-3.5's ranking of responses is also highly-correlated with correctness; its top two and top three choices are correct 71% and 88% of the time, respectively, indicating very strong non-entailment performance. While our ability to interpret these results is limited by nascent scientific understanding of LLMs and the proprietary nature of GPT, we believe that these results strongly suggest that an LLM will pass the MBE component of the Bar Exam in the near future.
abstract_zh: 美国几乎所有司法管辖区都要求进行专业执照考试（通常称为“律师考试”），作为法律执业的先决条件。即使要参加考试，大多数司法管辖区都要求申请人完成至少七年的高等教育，其中包括在认可的法学院学习三年。此外，大多数考生还需要进行数周至数月的针对考试的进一步准备。尽管投入了大量的时间和资金，但大约五分之一的考生在第一次尝试时的成绩仍然低于通过考试所需的分数。面对需要如此深度知识的复杂任务，那么我们应该对“人工智能”的最新技术抱有怎样的期望呢？在这项研究中，我们记录了对 OpenAI 的“text-davinci-003”模型（通常称为 GPT-3.5）在考试的多态多项选择 (MBE) 部分的性能的实验评估。虽然我们发现在训练数据规模上微调 GPT-3.5 的零样本性能没有任何好处，但我们确实发现超参数优化和即时工程对 GPT-3.5 的零样本性能产生了积极影响。对于最佳提示和参数，GPT-3.5 在完整的 NCBE MBE 练习考试中达到了 50.3% 的标题正确率，大大超过了 25% 的基线猜测率，并且在证据和侵权方面均达到了通过率。 GPT-3.5 的回复排名也与正确性高度相关；其前两个和前三个选择的正确率分别为 71% 和 88%，这表明非蕴涵性能非常强。虽然我们解释这些结果的能力受到对法学硕士的新生科学理解和 GPT 的专有性质的限制，但我们相信这些结果强烈表明法学硕士将在不久的将来通过律师资格考试的 MBE 部分。

AI.tldr: 评估GPT-3.5在律师资格考试多州多项选择题（MBE）部分的表现
AI.motivation: 探讨当前AI在复杂法律考试中的能力，验证LLM是否能通过需要深度知识的Bar Exam多选部分
AI.method: 使用GPT-3.5模型进行零样本测试，通过超参数优化和提示工程提升性能
AI.result: GPT-3.5在NCBE MBE模拟考试中达到50.3%正确率，超越25%随机基线，在Evidence和Torts科目达到及格线，前两/前三选项正确率分别为71%/88%
AI.conclusion: 表明大型语言模型可能在短期内通过MBE考试

title: Visual CPG-RL: Learning Central Pattern Generators for Visually-Guided Quadruped Locomotion
title_zh: Visual CPG-RL：用于视觉引导四足动物运动的学习中央模式生成器
comment: Accepted for 2024 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted for 2024 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: We present a framework for learning visually-guided quadruped locomotion by integrating exteroceptive sensing and central pattern generators (CPGs), i.e. systems of coupled oscillators, into the deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework. Through both exteroceptive and proprioceptive sensing, the agent learns to coordinate rhythmic behavior among different oscillators to track velocity commands, while at the same time override these commands to avoid collisions with the environment. We investigate several open robotics and neuroscience questions: 1) What is the role of explicit interoscillator couplings between oscillators, and can such coupling improve sim-to-real transfer for navigation robustness? 2) What are the effects of using a memory-enabled vs. a memory-free policy network with respect to robustness, energy-efficiency, and tracking performance in sim-to-real navigation tasks? 3) How do animals manage to tolerate high sensorimotor delays, yet still produce smooth and robust gaits? To answer these questions, we train our perceptive locomotion policies in simulation and perform sim-to-real transfers to the Unitree Go1 quadruped, where we observe robust navigation in a variety of scenarios. Our results show that the CPG, explicit interoscillator couplings, and memory-enabled policy representations are all beneficial for energy efficiency, robustness to noise and sensory delays of 90 ms, and tracking performance for successful sim-to-real transfer for navigation tasks. Video results can be found at https://youtu.be/wpsbSMzIwgM.
summary: We present a framework for learning visually-guided quadruped locomotion by integrating exteroceptive sensing and central pattern generators (CPGs), i.e. systems of coupled oscillators, into the deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework. Through both exteroceptive and proprioceptive sensing, the agent learns to coordinate rhythmic behavior among different oscillators to track velocity commands, while at the same time override these commands to avoid collisions with the environment. We investigate several open robotics and neuroscience questions: 1) What is the role of explicit interoscillator couplings between oscillators, and can such coupling improve sim-to-real transfer for navigation robustness? 2) What are the effects of using a memory-enabled vs. a memory-free policy network with respect to robustness, energy-efficiency, and tracking performance in sim-to-real navigation tasks? 3) How do animals manage to tolerate high sensorimotor delays, yet still produce smooth and robust gaits? To answer these questions, we train our perceptive locomotion policies in simulation and perform sim-to-real transfers to the Unitree Go1 quadruped, where we observe robust navigation in a variety of scenarios. Our results show that the CPG, explicit interoscillator couplings, and memory-enabled policy representations are all beneficial for energy efficiency, robustness to noise and sensory delays of 90 ms, and tracking performance for successful sim-to-real transfer for navigation tasks. Video results can be found at https://youtu.be/wpsbSMzIwgM.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个通过将外感受传感和中央模式生成器（CPG）（即耦合振荡器系统）集成到深度强化学习（DRL）框架中来学习视觉引导四足动物运动的框架。通过外感受和本体感受感知，代理学习协调不同振荡器之间的节奏行为以跟踪速度命令，同时覆盖这些命令以避免与环境发生碰撞。我们研究了几个开放的机器人学和神经科学问题：1）振荡器之间的显式振荡器间耦合的作用是什么，这种耦合能否改善模拟到真实的传输以实现导航鲁棒性？ 2) 在模拟到真实的导航任务中，使用启用内存的策略网络与使用无内存的策略网络对鲁棒性、能源效率和跟踪性能有何影响？ 3）动物如何能够忍受高感觉运动延迟，同时仍能产生平稳而有力的步态？为了回答这些问题，我们在模拟中训练我们的感知运动策略，并对 Unitree Go1 四足动物执行模拟到真实的传输，在其中我们观察到各种场景下的稳健导航。我们的结果表明，CPG、显式振荡器间耦合和支持内存的策略表示都有益于能源效率、噪声鲁棒性和 90 毫秒的感知延迟，以及导航任务成功模拟到真实传输的跟踪性能。视频结果可在 https://youtu.be/wpsbSMzIwgM 找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合视觉感知和中央模式发生器（CPG）的深度强化学习框架，用于实现四足机器人的视觉引导运动控制。
AI.motivation: 解决四足机器人在复杂环境中导航时的鲁棒性、能量效率及模拟到现实的迁移问题，探索CPG耦合机制与记忆策略对运动控制的影响。
AI.method: 将外感受传感器与CPG系统集成到深度强化学习框架中，通过显式振荡器耦合协调运动节律，并对比记忆型与无记忆型策略网络的性能差异，最终在Unitree Go1机器人上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明CPG耦合与记忆策略显著提升了能量效率、对90ms感知延迟的鲁棒性及导航跟踪性能，成功实现模拟到现实的迁移。
AI.conclusion: CPG机制、振荡器耦合及记忆策略共同增强了四足机器人在复杂环境中的运动鲁棒性与适应性，为类脑运动控制提供新思路。

search_text: Visual CPG-RL: Learning Central Pattern Generators for Visually-Guided Quadruped Locomotion Visual CPG-RL：用于视觉引导四足动物运动的学习中央模式生成器 We present a framework for learning visually-guided quadruped locomotion by integrating exteroceptive sensing and central pattern generators (CPGs), i.e. systems of coupled oscillators, into the deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework. Through both exteroceptive and proprioceptive sensing, the agent learns to coordinate rhythmic behavior among different oscillators to track velocity commands, while at the same time override these commands to avoid collisions with the environment. We investigate several open robotics and neuroscience questions: 1) What is the role of explicit interoscillator couplings between oscillators, and can such coupling improve sim-to-real transfer for navigation robustness? 2) What are the effects of using a memory-enabled vs. a memory-free policy network with respect to robustness, energy-efficiency, and tracking performance in sim-to-real navigation tasks? 3) How do animals manage to tolerate high sensorimotor delays, yet still produce smooth and robust gaits? To answer these questions, we train our perceptive locomotion policies in simulation and perform sim-to-real transfers to the Unitree Go1 quadruped, where we observe robust navigation in a variety of scenarios. Our results show that the CPG, explicit interoscillator couplings, and memory-enabled policy representations are all beneficial for energy efficiency, robustness to noise and sensory delays of 90 ms, and tracking performance for successful sim-to-real transfer for navigation tasks. Video results can be found at https://youtu.be/wpsbSMzIwgM. 我们提出了一个通过将外感受传感和中央模式生成器（CPG）（即耦合振荡器系统）集成到深度强化学习（DRL）框架中来学习视觉引导四足动物运动的框架。通过外感受和本体感受感知，代理学习协调不同振荡器之间的节奏行为以跟踪速度命令，同时覆盖这些命令以避免与环境发生碰撞。我们研究了几个开放的机器人学和神经科学问题：1）振荡器之间的显式振荡器间耦合的作用是什么，这种耦合能否改善模拟到真实的传输以实现导航鲁棒性？ 2) 在模拟到真实的导航任务中，使用启用内存的策略网络与使用无内存的策略网络对鲁棒性、能源效率和跟踪性能有何影响？ 3）动物如何能够忍受高感觉运动延迟，同时仍能产生平稳而有力的步态？为了回答这些问题，我们在模拟中训练我们的感知运动策略，并对 Unitree Go1 四足动物执行模拟到真实的传输，在其中我们观察到各种场景下的稳健导航。我们的结果表明，CPG、显式振荡器间耦合和支持内存的策略表示都有益于能源效率、噪声鲁棒性和 90 毫秒的感知延迟，以及导航任务成功模拟到真实传输的跟踪性能。视频结果可在 https://youtu.be/wpsbSMzIwgM 找到。 该论文提出了一种结合视觉感知和中央模式发生器（CPG）的深度强化学习框架，用于实现四足机器人的视觉引导运动控制。 Guillaume Bellegarda,Milad Shafiee,Auke Ijspeert cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY

title: Quantum Mass Production Theorems
title_zh: 量子量产定理
abstract: We prove that for any $n$-qubit unitary transformation $U$ and for any $r = 2^{o(n / \log n)}$, there exists a quantum circuit to implement $U^{\otimes r}$ with at most $O(4^n)$ gates. This asymptotically equals the number of gates needed to implement just a single copy of a worst-case $U$. We also establish analogous results for quantum states and diagonal unitary transformations. Our techniques are based on the work of Uhlig [Math. Notes 1974], who proved a similar mass production theorem for Boolean functions.
summary: We prove that for any $n$-qubit unitary transformation $U$ and for any $r = 2^{o(n / \log n)}$, there exists a quantum circuit to implement $U^{\otimes r}$ with at most $O(4^n)$ gates. This asymptotically equals the number of gates needed to implement just a single copy of a worst-case $U$. We also establish analogous results for quantum states and diagonal unitary transformations. Our techniques are based on the work of Uhlig [Math. Notes 1974], who proved a similar mass production theorem for Boolean functions.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，对于任何$n$-量子位酉变换$U$和任何$r = 2^{o(n / \log n)}$，存在一个量子电路来实现$U^{\otimes r}$，最多具有$O(4^n)$个门。这渐近等于实现最坏情况 $U$ 的单个副本所需的门数。我们还为量子态和对角酉变换建立了类似的结果。我们的技术基于 Uhlig [Math. Notes 1974]，他证明了布尔函数的类似大规模生产定理。

AI.tldr: 本文证明对于任意n量子比特酉变换U和任意r=2^{o(n/logn)}，存在一个至多O(4^n)个门的量子电路来实现U^{\otimes r}，其渐近等价于实现单个最坏情况U所需的门数。
AI.motivation: 量子计算中，实现大量相同酉变换的并行副本（mass production）通常需要大量资源，本文旨在探索是否存在高效的量子电路来同时实现多个副本，使得门复杂度与实现单个副本相当。
AI.method: 基于Uhlig [Math. Notes 1974]针对布尔函数的批量生产定理，将其技术扩展到量子场景，处理酉变换、量子态和对角酉变换的批量实现。
AI.result: 对于任意n量子比特酉变换U和r=2^{o(n/logn)}，存在门数为O(4^n)的量子电路实现U^{\otimes r}；对量子态和对角酉变换也建立了类似结果。
AI.conclusion: 量子批量生产定理表明，大量相同酉变换副本可以几乎零额外成本地并行实现，为量子电路优化提供了重要的理论下限和设计思路。

authors_text: Krzysztof Lis,Matthias Rottmann,Annika Mütze,Sina Honari,Pascal Fua,Mathieu Salzmann
title: AttEntropy: On the Generalization Ability of Supervised Semantic Segmentation Transformers to New Objects in New Domains
title_zh: AttEntropy：关于有监督语义分割变压器对新领域新对象的泛化能力
abstract: In addition to impressive performance, vision transformers have demonstrated remarkable abilities to encode information they were not trained to extract. For example, this information can be used to perform segmentation or single-view depth estimation even though the networks were only trained for image recognition. We show that a similar phenomenon occurs when explicitly training transformers for semantic segmentation in a supervised manner for a set of categories: Once trained, they provide valuable information even about categories absent from the training set. This information can be used to segment objects from these never-seen-before classes in domains as varied as road obstacles, aircraft parked at a terminal, lunar rocks, and maritime hazards.
summary: In addition to impressive performance, vision transformers have demonstrated remarkable abilities to encode information they were not trained to extract. For example, this information can be used to perform segmentation or single-view depth estimation even though the networks were only trained for image recognition. We show that a similar phenomenon occurs when explicitly training transformers for semantic segmentation in a supervised manner for a set of categories: Once trained, they provide valuable information even about categories absent from the training set. This information can be used to segment objects from these never-seen-before classes in domains as varied as road obstacles, aircraft parked at a terminal, lunar rocks, and maritime hazards.
abstract_zh: 除了令人印象深刻的性能之外，视觉转换器还表现出了非凡的能力，可以对未经训练的信息进行编码。例如，即使网络仅针对图像识别进行训练，该信息也可用于执行分割或单视图深度估计。我们表明，当以有监督的方式对一组类别显式训练语义分割变压器时，会发生类似的现象：经过训练，它们甚至可以提供有关训练集中缺少的类别的有价值的信息。这些信息可用于从道路障碍物、停在码头的飞机、月球岩石和海上危险等各种领域中的前所未见的类别中分割物体。

AI.tldr: 本文研究监督语义分割变换器在新领域新物体上的泛化能力，提出AttEntropy方法以评估其对未知类别的分割潜力。
AI.motivation: 视觉变换器在未训练任务中展现信息编码能力，但监督训练的分割模型是否具备类似泛化能力尚不明确，需验证其跨领域适应性。
AI.method: 通过分析注意力机制的熵值（AttEntropy），量化模型对训练集外类别的信息提取能力，并在多领域数据集上验证分割效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，训练后的变换器可有效分割未见类别，适用于道路障碍、航空器、月球岩石等多样化场景，证明其强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 监督语义分割变换器具备跨领域泛化潜力，AttEntropy方法为评估和利用该能力提供有效工具，推动模型在未知场景中的应用。

For example, this information can be used to perform segmentation or single-view depth estimation even though the networks were only trained for image recognition. We show that a similar phenomenon occurs when explicitly training transformers for semantic segmentation in a supervised manner for a set of categories: Once trained, they provide valuable information even about categories absent from the training set. This information can be used to segment objects from these never-seen-before classes in domains as varied as road obstacles, aircraft parked at a terminal, lunar rocks, and maritime hazards. 除了令人印象深刻的性能之外，视觉转换器还表现出了非凡的能力，可以对未经训练的信息进行编码。例如，即使网络仅针对图像识别进行训练，该信息也可用于执行分割或单视图深度估计。我们表明，当以有监督的方式对一组类别显式训练语义分割变压器时，会发生类似的现象：经过训练，它们甚至可以提供有关训练集中缺少的类别的有价值的信息。这些信息可用于从道路障碍物、停在码头的飞机、月球岩石和海上危险等各种领域中的前所未见的类别中分割物体。 本文研究监督语义分割变换器在新领域新物体上的泛化能力，提出AttEntropy方法以评估其对未知类别的分割潜力。 Krzysztof Lis,Matthias Rottmann,Annika Mütze,Sina Honari,Pascal Fua,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV

title: Eliminating Meta Optimization Through Self-Referential Meta Learning
title_zh: 通过自我参考元学习消除元优化
comment: The first version appeared at ICML 2022, DARL Workshop
comments: The first version appeared at ICML 2022, DARL Workshop
abstract: Meta Learning automates the search for learning algorithms. At the same time, it creates a dependency on human engineering on the meta-level, where meta learning algorithms need to be designed. In this paper, we investigate self-referential meta learning systems that modify themselves without the need for explicit meta optimization. We discuss the relationship of such systems to in-context and memory-based meta learning and show that self-referential neural networks require functionality to be reused in the form of parameter sharing. Finally, we propose fitness monotonic execution (FME), a simple approach to avoid explicit meta optimization. A neural network self-modifies to solve bandit and classic control tasks, improves its self-modifications, and learns how to learn, purely by assigning more computational resources to better performing solutions.
summary: Meta Learning automates the search for learning algorithms. At the same time, it creates a dependency on human engineering on the meta-level, where meta learning algorithms need to be designed. In this paper, we investigate self-referential meta learning systems that modify themselves without the need for explicit meta optimization. We discuss the relationship of such systems to in-context and memory-based meta learning and show that self-referential neural networks require functionality to be reused in the form of parameter sharing. Finally, we propose fitness monotonic execution (FME), a simple approach to avoid explicit meta optimization. A neural network self-modifies to solve bandit and classic control tasks, improves its self-modifications, and learns how to learn, purely by assigning more computational resources to better performing solutions.
abstract_zh: 元学习自动搜索学习算法。同时，它在元层面上产生了对人类工程学的依赖，需要在元层面上设计元学习算法。在本文中，我们研究了自我参考元学习系统，该系统可以自我修改，而不需要显式元优化。我们讨论了此类系统与上下文和基于记忆的元学习的关系，并表明自参考神经网络需要以参数共享的形式重用功能。最后，我们提出健身单调执行（FME），这是一种避免显式元优化的简单方法。神经网络通过自我修改来解决强盗和经典控制任务，改进其自我修改，并学习如何学习，纯粹是通过将更多计算资源分配给性能更好的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自指元学习框架，无需显式元优化即可实现神经网络的自我修改与性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统元学习依赖人工设计元算法，存在工程依赖问题，需减少对显式元优化的依赖。
AI.method: 提出基于参数共享和计算资源动态分配的FME方法，使网络通过自我修改解决任务并优化学习过程。
AI.result: 系统在bandit和经典控制任务中实现自我改进，无需人工干预。
AI.conclusion: 自指元学习可减少对显式元优化依赖，推动自动化学习算法发展。

title: Controllable Mechanical-domain Energy Accumulators
title_zh: 可控机械域蓄能器
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: Springs are efficient in storing and returning elastic potential energy but are unable to hold the energy they store in the absence of an external load. Lockable springs use clutches to hold elastic potential energy in the absence of an external load, but have not yet been widely adopted in applications, partly because clutches introduce design complexity, reduce energy efficiency, and typically do not afford high fidelity control over the energy stored by the spring. Here, we present the design of a novel lockable compression spring that uses a small capstan clutch to passively lock a mechanical spring. The capstan clutch can lock over 1000 N force at any arbitrary deflection, unlock the spring in less than 10 ms with a control force less than 1 % of the maximal spring force, and provide an 80 % energy storage and return efficiency (comparable to a highly efficient electric motor operated at constant nominal speed). By retaining the form factor of a regular spring while providing high-fidelity locking capability even under large spring forces, the proposed design could facilitate the development of energy-efficient spring-based actuators and robots.
summary: Springs are efficient in storing and returning elastic potential energy but are unable to hold the energy they store in the absence of an external load. Lockable springs use clutches to hold elastic potential energy in the absence of an external load, but have not yet been widely adopted in applications, partly because clutches introduce design complexity, reduce energy efficiency, and typically do not afford high fidelity control over the energy stored by the spring. Here, we present the design of a novel lockable compression spring that uses a small capstan clutch to passively lock a mechanical spring. The capstan clutch can lock over 1000 N force at any arbitrary deflection, unlock the spring in less than 10 ms with a control force less than 1 % of the maximal spring force, and provide an 80 % energy storage and return efficiency (comparable to a highly efficient electric motor operated at constant nominal speed). By retaining the form factor of a regular spring while providing high-fidelity locking capability even under large spring forces, the proposed design could facilitate the development of energy-efficient spring-based actuators and robots.
abstract_zh: 弹簧可以有效地存储和返回弹性势能，但在没有外部负载的情况下无法保持其存储的能量。可锁定弹簧使用离合器在没有外部负载的情况下保持弹性势能，但尚未在应用中广泛采用，部分原因是离合器引入了设计复杂性，降低了能源效率，并且通常无法对弹簧存储的能量提供高保真度控制。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的可锁定压缩弹簧的设计，该弹簧使用小型绞盘离合器来被动锁定机械弹簧。绞盘离合器可以在任意偏转下锁定超过 1000 N 的力，在不到 10 ms 的时间内解锁弹簧，控制力小于最大弹簧力的 1%，并提供 80% 的能量存储和返回效率（与在恒定额定速度下运行的高效电动机相比）。通过保留常规弹簧的形状系数，同时即使在大弹簧力下也能提供高保真锁定能力，所提出的设计可以促进基于弹簧的节能执行器和机器人的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种新型可锁定压缩弹簧，通过小型曳引轮离合器实现高精度能量存储与释放控制。
AI.motivation: 传统弹簧无法在无负载时保持能量，现有锁式弹簧存在设计复杂、效率低及控制精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用小型曳引轮离合器被动锁定机械弹簧，在任意变形下实现高力锁止与快速解锁，控制力低于最大弹簧力1%。
AI.result: 实现1000N以上锁定力，解锁时间＜10ms，能量存储返回效率达80%，保持弹簧原有外形。
AI.conclusion: 该设计可推动高效弹簧驱动的执行器与机器人发展，兼顾能量效率与精确控制。

title: Novel Spring Mechanism Enables Iterative Energy Accumulation under Force and Deformation Constraints
title_zh: 新型弹簧机制可在力和变形约束下实现迭代能量积累
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023 for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2023 for possible publication
abstract: Springs can provide force at zero net energy cost by recycling negative mechanical work to benefit motor-driven robots or spring-augmented humans. However, humans have limited force and range of motion, and motors have a limited ability to produce force. These limits constrain how much energy a conventional spring can store and, consequently, how much assistance a spring can provide. In this paper, we introduce an approach to accumulating negative work in assistive springs over several motion cycles. We show that, by utilizing a novel floating spring mechanism, the weight of a human or robot can be used to iteratively increase spring compression, irrespective of the potential energy stored by the spring. Decoupling the force required to compress a spring from the energy stored by a spring advances prior works, and could enable spring-driven robots and humans to perform physically demanding tasks without the use of large actuators.
summary: Springs can provide force at zero net energy cost by recycling negative mechanical work to benefit motor-driven robots or spring-augmented humans. However, humans have limited force and range of motion, and motors have a limited ability to produce force. These limits constrain how much energy a conventional spring can store and, consequently, how much assistance a spring can provide. In this paper, we introduce an approach to accumulating negative work in assistive springs over several motion cycles. We show that, by utilizing a novel floating spring mechanism, the weight of a human or robot can be used to iteratively increase spring compression, irrespective of the potential energy stored by the spring. Decoupling the force required to compress a spring from the energy stored by a spring advances prior works, and could enable spring-driven robots and humans to perform physically demanding tasks without the use of large actuators.
abstract_zh: 弹簧可以通过回收负机械功以零净能量成本提供力，从而使电机驱动的机器人或弹簧增强的人类受益。然而，人类的力量和运动范围有限，电机产生力量的能力也有限。这些限制限制了传统弹簧可以存储多少能量，从而限制了弹簧可以提供多少帮助。在本文中，我们介绍了一种在多个运动周期内累积辅助弹簧负功的方法。我们表明，通过利用新型浮动弹簧机构，人或机器人的重量可以用于迭代地增加弹簧压缩，而不管弹簧存储的势能如何。将压缩弹簧所需的力与弹簧存储的能量解耦，推进了先前的工作，并且可以使弹簧驱动的机器人和人类能够在不使用大型执行器的情况下执行体力要求较高的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型浮动弹簧机制，可在力和变形约束下实现多次运动循环中的能量累积，从而提升辅助弹簧的储能能力。
AI.motivation: 传统弹簧因人体或机器人力量与运动范围的限制，难以有效储存能量，制约了其在辅助设备中的应用。
AI.method: 通过设计浮动弹簧机制，利用人体或机器人的重量在多个运动周期中迭代增加弹簧压缩量，实现与弹簧势能无关的力与能量解耦。
AI.result: 实验表明，该机制可突破传统弹簧储能限制，为弹簧驱动的机器人或人体提供更强的物理辅助能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需大型执行器的高能效弹簧驱动系统提供了新思路，有望推动辅助设备在复杂任务中的应用。

motivation: 传统弹簧因人体或机器人力量与运动范围的限制，难以有效储存能量，制约了其在辅助设备中的应用。
method: 通过设计浮动弹簧机制，利用人体或机器人的重量在多个运动周期中迭代增加弹簧压缩量，实现与弹簧势能无关的力与能量解耦。
result: 实验表明，该机制可突破传统弹簧储能限制，为弹簧驱动的机器人或人体提供更强的物理辅助能力。
conclusion: 该方法为无需大型执行器的高能效弹簧驱动系统提供了新思路，有望推动辅助设备在复杂任务中的应用。
search_text: Novel Spring Mechanism Enables Iterative Energy Accumulation under Force and Deformation Constraints 新型弹簧机制可在力和变形约束下实现迭代能量积累 Springs can provide force at zero net energy cost by recycling negative mechanical work to benefit motor-driven robots or spring-augmented humans. However, humans have limited force and range of motion, and motors have a limited ability to produce force. These limits constrain how much energy a conventional spring can store and, consequently, how much assistance a spring can provide. In this paper, we introduce an approach to accumulating negative work in assistive springs over several motion cycles. We show that, by utilizing a novel floating spring mechanism, the weight of a human or robot can be used to iteratively increase spring compression, irrespective of the potential energy stored by the spring. Decoupling the force required to compress a spring from the energy stored by a spring advances prior works, and could enable spring-driven robots and humans to perform physically demanding tasks without the use of large actuators. 弹簧可以通过回收负机械功以零净能量成本提供力，从而使电机驱动的机器人或弹簧增强的人类受益。然而，人类的力量和运动范围有限，电机产生力量的能力也有限。这些限制限制了传统弹簧可以存储多少能量，从而限制了弹簧可以提供多少帮助。在本文中，我们介绍了一种在多个运动周期内累积辅助弹簧负功的方法。我们表明，通过利用新型浮动弹簧机构，人或机器人的重量可以用于迭代地增加弹簧压缩，而不管弹簧存储的势能如何。将压缩弹簧所需的力与弹簧存储的能量解耦，推进了先前的工作，并且可以使弹簧驱动的机器人和人类能够在不使用大型执行器的情况下执行体力要求较高的任务。 本文提出了一种新型浮动弹簧机制，可在力和变形约束下实现多次运动循环中的能量累积，从而提升辅助弹簧的储能能力。 Cole A. Dempsey,David J. Braun cs.RO

authors_text: Barak Hoffer,Nicolás Wainstein,Christopher M. Neumann,Eric Pop,Eilam Yalon,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: Stateful Logic using Phase Change Memory
title_zh: 使用相变存储器的状态逻辑
comment: ef:IEEE Journal on Exploratory Solid-State Computational Devices and Circuits (Volume: 8, Issue: 2, December 2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Journal on Exploratory Solid-State Computational Devices and Circuits (Volume: 8, Issue: 2, December 2022)
abstract: Stateful logic is a digital processing-in-memory technique that could address von Neumann memory bottleneck challenges while maintaining backward compatibility with standard von Neumann architectures. In stateful logic, memory cells are used to perform the logic operations without reading or moving any data outside the memory array. Stateful logic has been previously demonstrated using several resistive memory types, mostly by resistive RAM (RRAM). Here we present a new method to design stateful logic using a different resistive memory - phase change memory (PCM). We propose and experimentally demonstrate four logic gate types (NOR, IMPLY, OR, NIMP) using commonly used PCM materials. Our stateful logic circuits are different than previously proposed circuits due to the different switching mechanism and functionality of PCM compared to RRAM. Since the proposed stateful logic form a functionally complete set, these gates enable sequential execution of any logic function within the memory, paving the way to PCM-based digital processing-in-memory systems.
summary: Stateful logic is a digital processing-in-memory technique that could address von Neumann memory bottleneck challenges while maintaining backward compatibility with standard von Neumann architectures. In stateful logic, memory cells are used to perform the logic operations without reading or moving any data outside the memory array. Stateful logic has been previously demonstrated using several resistive memory types, mostly by resistive RAM (RRAM). Here we present a new method to design stateful logic using a different resistive memory - phase change memory (PCM). We propose and experimentally demonstrate four logic gate types (NOR, IMPLY, OR, NIMP) using commonly used PCM materials. Our stateful logic circuits are different than previously proposed circuits due to the different switching mechanism and functionality of PCM compared to RRAM. Since the proposed stateful logic form a functionally complete set, these gates enable sequential execution of any logic function within the memory, paving the way to PCM-based digital processing-in-memory systems.
abstract_zh: 状态逻辑是一种内存中的数字处理技术，可以解决冯·诺依曼内存瓶颈挑战，同时保持与标准冯·诺依曼架构的向后兼容性。在状态逻辑中，存储单元用于执行逻辑操作，而无需读取或移动存储阵列外部的任何数据。之前已使用多种电阻式存储器类型（主要是电阻式 RAM (RRAM)）演示了状态逻辑。在这里，我们提出了一种使用不同的电阻存储器——相变存储器（PCM）来设计状态逻辑的新方法。我们使用常用的 PCM 材料提出并通过实验演示了四种逻辑门类型（NOR、IMPLY、OR、NIMP）。由于 PCM 与 RRAM 相比具有不同的切换机制和功能，我们的状态逻辑电路与之前提出的电路不同。由于所提出的有状态逻辑形成了功能完整的集合，因此这些门能够顺序执行存储器内的任何逻辑功能，为基于 PCM 的存储器内数字处理系统铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实验验证了一种基于相变存储器（PCM）的新状态逻辑设计方法，实现了四种逻辑门（NOR、IMPLY、OR、NIMP），用于解决冯·诺依曼架构的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 冯·诺依曼架构存在内存瓶颈，传统状态逻辑多依赖RRAM，而PCM具有不同的开关机制和功能特性，需探索其在状态逻辑中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 利用常见PCM材料，设计并实验验证四种逻辑门电路，通过其独特的电阻切换特性实现逻辑运算，区别于RRAM的实现方式。
AI.result: 成功构建了四种功能完整的逻辑门，可在内存内顺序执行任意逻辑函数，为基于PCM的处理-内存系统提供了可行性方案。
AI.conclusion: 基于PCM的状态逻辑方案展示了数字处理-内存系统的潜力，为突破冯·诺依曼瓶颈提供了新方向。

title: Long-horizon video prediction using a dynamic latent hierarchy
title_zh: 使用动态潜在层次结构的长视野视频预测
abstract: The task of video prediction and generation is known to be notoriously difficult, with the research in this area largely limited to short-term predictions. Though plagued with noise and stochasticity, videos consist of features that are organised in a spatiotemporal hierarchy, different features possessing different temporal dynamics. In this paper, we introduce Dynamic Latent Hierarchy (DLH) -- a deep hierarchical latent model that represents videos as a hierarchy of latent states that evolve over separate and fluid timescales. Each latent state is a mixture distribution with two components, representing the immediate past and the predicted future, causing the model to learn transitions only between sufficiently dissimilar states, while clustering temporally persistent states closer together. Using this unique property, DLH naturally discovers the spatiotemporal structure of a dataset and learns disentangled representations across its hierarchy. We hypothesise that this simplifies the task of modeling temporal dynamics of a video, improves the learning of long-term dependencies, and reduces error accumulation. As evidence, we demonstrate that DLH outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks in video prediction, is able to better represent stochasticity, as well as to dynamically adjust its hierarchical and temporal structure. Our paper shows, among other things, how progress in representation learning can translate into progress in prediction tasks.
summary: The task of video prediction and generation is known to be notoriously difficult, with the research in this area largely limited to short-term predictions. Though plagued with noise and stochasticity, videos consist of features that are organised in a spatiotemporal hierarchy, different features possessing different temporal dynamics. In this paper, we introduce Dynamic Latent Hierarchy (DLH) -- a deep hierarchical latent model that represents videos as a hierarchy of latent states that evolve over separate and fluid timescales. Each latent state is a mixture distribution with two components, representing the immediate past and the predicted future, causing the model to learn transitions only between sufficiently dissimilar states, while clustering temporally persistent states closer together. Using this unique property, DLH naturally discovers the spatiotemporal structure of a dataset and learns disentangled representations across its hierarchy. We hypothesise that this simplifies the task of modeling temporal dynamics of a video, improves the learning of long-term dependencies, and reduces error accumulation. As evidence, we demonstrate that DLH outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks in video prediction, is able to better represent stochasticity, as well as to dynamically adjust its hierarchical and temporal structure. Our paper shows, among other things, how progress in representation learning can translate into progress in prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，视频预测和生成的任务非常困难，该领域的研究主要局限于短期预测。尽管受到噪声和随机性的困扰，但视频由按时空层次结构组织的特征组成，不同的特征具有不同的时间动态。在本文中，我们介绍了动态潜在层次结构（DLH）——一种深层层次潜在模型，它将视频表示为在独立且流动的时间尺度上演化的潜在状态层次结构。每个潜在状态都是具有两个分量的混合分布，代表刚刚过去和预测的未来，导致模型仅学习足够不相似的状态之间的转换，同时将时间持久状态聚集在一起。利用这一独特的属性，DLH 自然地发现数据集的时空结构，并学习其层次结构中的解缠结表示。我们假设这简化了视频时间动态建模的任务，改进了长期依赖性的学习，并减少了错误累积。作为证据，我们证明 DLH 在视频预测方面优于最先进的基准，能够更好地表示随机性，并动态调整其层次和时间结构。我们的论文展示了表征学习的进展如何转化为预测任务的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态潜在层次模型（DLH），用于解决长时域视频预测任务，通过捕捉视频的时空层次结构来提升预测效果。
AI.motivation: 视频预测因时空动态复杂性和噪声干扰而难以实现长期准确预测，现有方法多局限于短期预测，缺乏对层次化时空特征的有效建模。
AI.method: 构建动态潜在层次模型（DLH），将视频表示为多层级潜在状态，每个状态由混合分布表示（包含即时过去和预测未来两部分），通过不同时间尺度的层次化状态转移学习时空结构。
AI.result: DLH在视频预测基准测试中优于现有方法，能更准确表征随机性并动态调整层次结构，有效缓解误差累积问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进表示学习方法可显著提升预测任务性能，动态潜在层次模型为长时域视频预测提供了新思路。

We hypothesise that this simplifies the task of modeling temporal dynamics of a video, improves the learning of long-term dependencies, and reduces error accumulation. As evidence, we demonstrate that DLH outperforms state-of-the-art benchmarks in video prediction, is able to better represent stochasticity, as well as to dynamically adjust its hierarchical and temporal structure. Our paper shows, among other things, how progress in representation learning can translate into progress in prediction tasks. 众所周知，视频预测和生成的任务非常困难，该领域的研究主要局限于短期预测。尽管受到噪声和随机性的困扰，但视频由按时空层次结构组织的特征组成，不同的特征具有不同的时间动态。在本文中，我们介绍了动态潜在层次结构（DLH）——一种深层层次潜在模型，它将视频表示为在独立且流动的时间尺度上演化的潜在状态层次结构。每个潜在状态都是具有两个分量的混合分布，代表刚刚过去和预测的未来，导致模型仅学习足够不相似的状态之间的转换，同时将时间持久状态聚集在一起。利用这一独特的属性，DLH 自然地发现数据集的时空结构，并学习其层次结构中的解缠结表示。我们假设这简化了视频时间动态建模的任务，改进了长期依赖性的学习，并减少了错误累积。作为证据，我们证明 DLH 在视频预测方面优于最先进的基准，能够更好地表示随机性，并动态调整其层次和时间结构。我们的论文展示了表征学习的进展如何转化为预测任务的进展。 本文提出了一种动态潜在层次模型（DLH），用于解决长时域视频预测任务，通过捕捉视频的时空层次结构来提升预测效果。 Alexey Zakharov,Qinghai Guo,Zafeirios Fountas cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Learning One Abstract Bit at a Time Through Self-Invented Experiments Encoded as Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过编码为神经网络的自我发明实验一次学习一点抽象知识
abstract: There are two important things in science: (A) Finding answers to given questions, and (B) Coming up with good questions. Our artificial scientists not only learn to answer given questions, but also continually invent new questions, by proposing hypotheses to be verified or falsified through potentially complex and time-consuming experiments, including thought experiments akin to those of mathematicians. While an artificial scientist expands its knowledge, it remains biased towards the simplest, least costly experiments that still have surprising outcomes, until they become boring. We present an empirical analysis of the automatic generation of interesting experiments. In the first setting, we investigate self-invented experiments in a reinforcement-providing environment and show that they lead to effective exploration. In the second setting, pure thought experiments are implemented as the weights of recurrent neural networks generated by a neural experiment generator. Initially interesting thought experiments may become boring over time.
summary: There are two important things in science: (A) Finding answers to given questions, and (B) Coming up with good questions. Our artificial scientists not only learn to answer given questions, but also continually invent new questions, by proposing hypotheses to be verified or falsified through potentially complex and time-consuming experiments, including thought experiments akin to those of mathematicians. While an artificial scientist expands its knowledge, it remains biased towards the simplest, least costly experiments that still have surprising outcomes, until they become boring. We present an empirical analysis of the automatic generation of interesting experiments. In the first setting, we investigate self-invented experiments in a reinforcement-providing environment and show that they lead to effective exploration. In the second setting, pure thought experiments are implemented as the weights of recurrent neural networks generated by a neural experiment generator. Initially interesting thought experiments may become boring over time.
abstract_zh: 科学中有两件重要的事情：（A）找到给定问题的答案，（B）提出好问题。我们的人工智能科学家不仅学会回答给定的问题，而且还不断提出新的问题，通过可能复杂且耗时的实验（包括类似于数学家的思想实验）来验证或证伪的假设。虽然人工智能扩展了其知识，但它仍然偏向于最简单、成本最低的实验，这些实验仍然会产生令人惊讶的结果，直到它们变得无聊。我们对自动生成有趣实验进行了实证分析。在第一种设置中，我们在提供强化的环境中研究了自我发明的实验，并表明它们可以带来有效的探索。在第二种设置中，纯思想实验被实现为由神经实验生成器生成的循环神经网络的权重。最初有趣的思想实验随着时间的推移可能会变得无聊。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过自发明的实验（编码为神经网络）逐步学习抽象概念，并探索自动产生有趣实验的方法。
AI.motivation: 科学需要同时解决'回答问题'和'提出新问题'，现有系统多聚焦于前者，而人工科学家需具备自主发明实验以推动科学探索的能力。
AI.method: 设计两个实验设置：1）强化环境中自发明实验的探索；2）通过递归神经网络生成权重实现纯思维实验。
AI.result: 自发明实验在强化环境有效促进探索，而思维实验随时间可能因重复性导致趣味性下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可生成具有探索价值的实验，但需警惕实验新颖性随时间衰减的问题。

title: StyleRes: Transforming the Residuals for Real Image Editing with StyleGAN
title_zh: StyleRes：使用 StyleGAN 转换真实图像编辑的残差
abstract: We present a novel image inversion framework and a training pipeline to achieve high-fidelity image inversion with high-quality attribute editing. Inverting real images into StyleGAN's latent space is an extensively studied problem, yet the trade-off between the image reconstruction fidelity and image editing quality remains an open challenge. The low-rate latent spaces are limited in their expressiveness power for high-fidelity reconstruction. On the other hand, high-rate latent spaces result in degradation in editing quality. In this work, to achieve high-fidelity inversion, we learn residual features in higher latent codes that lower latent codes were not able to encode. This enables preserving image details in reconstruction. To achieve high-quality editing, we learn how to transform the residual features for adapting to manipulations in latent codes. We train the framework to extract residual features and transform them via a novel architecture pipeline and cycle consistency losses. We run extensive experiments and compare our method with state-of-the-art inversion methods. Qualitative metrics and visual comparisons show significant improvements. Code: https://github.com/hamzapehlivan/StyleRes
summary: We present a novel image inversion framework and a training pipeline to achieve high-fidelity image inversion with high-quality attribute editing. Inverting real images into StyleGAN's latent space is an extensively studied problem, yet the trade-off between the image reconstruction fidelity and image editing quality remains an open challenge. The low-rate latent spaces are limited in their expressiveness power for high-fidelity reconstruction. On the other hand, high-rate latent spaces result in degradation in editing quality. In this work, to achieve high-fidelity inversion, we learn residual features in higher latent codes that lower latent codes were not able to encode. This enables preserving image details in reconstruction. To achieve high-quality editing, we learn how to transform the residual features for adapting to manipulations in latent codes. We train the framework to extract residual features and transform them via a novel architecture pipeline and cycle consistency losses. We run extensive experiments and compare our method with state-of-the-art inversion methods. Qualitative metrics and visual comparisons show significant improvements. Code: https://github.com/hamzapehlivan/StyleRes
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的图像反演框架和训练流程，以通过高质量属性编辑实现高保真图像反演。将真实图像反转到 StyleGAN 的潜在空间是一个广泛研究的问题，但图像重建保真度和图像编辑质量之间的权衡仍然是一个开放的挑战。低速率潜在空间的高保真重建表达能力受到限制。另一方面，高速率潜在空间会导致编辑质量下降。在这项工作中，为了实现高保真反演，我们学习了较低潜在代码无法编码的较高潜在代码中的残留特征。这使得能够在重建中保留图像细节。为了实现高质量的编辑，我们学习如何转换残留特征以适应潜在代码中的操作。我们训练框架来提取残留特征，并通过新颖的架构管道和循环一致性损失来转换它们。我们进行了广泛的实验，并将我们的方法与最先进的反演方法进行了比较。定性指标和视觉比较显示出显着的改进。代码：https://github.com/hamzapehlivan/StyleRes

AI.tldr: 提出一种高保真图像反转和高质量属性编辑的框架
AI.motivation: 解决真实图像反转中重建保真度与编辑质量之间的权衡问题，克服低速率和高速率潜在空间的局限性
AI.method: 通过学习高潜在代码中的残差特征并利用新架构和循环一致性损失进行转换，以实现高保真重建和高质量编辑
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在定性和视觉比较上显著优于现有最先进的反转方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效平衡了重建保真度和编辑质量，为真实图像编辑提供了新的解决方案

title: On Learning the Structure of Clusters in Graphs
title_zh: 关于学习图中簇的结构
abstract: Graph clustering is a fundamental problem in unsupervised learning, with numerous applications in computer science and in analysing real-world data. In many real-world applications, we find that the clusters have a significant high-level structure. This is often overlooked in the design and analysis of graph clustering algorithms which make strong simplifying assumptions about the structure of the graph. This thesis addresses the natural question of whether the structure of clusters can be learned efficiently and describes four new algorithmic results for learning such structure in graphs and hypergraphs. All of the presented theoretical results are extensively evaluated on both synthetic and real-word datasets of different domains, including image classification and segmentation, migration networks, co-authorship networks, and natural language processing. These experimental results demonstrate that the newly developed algorithms are practical, effective, and immediately applicable for learning the structure of clusters in real-world data.
summary: Graph clustering is a fundamental problem in unsupervised learning, with numerous applications in computer science and in analysing real-world data. In many real-world applications, we find that the clusters have a significant high-level structure. This is often overlooked in the design and analysis of graph clustering algorithms which make strong simplifying assumptions about the structure of the graph. This thesis addresses the natural question of whether the structure of clusters can be learned efficiently and describes four new algorithmic results for learning such structure in graphs and hypergraphs. All of the presented theoretical results are extensively evaluated on both synthetic and real-word datasets of different domains, including image classification and segmentation, migration networks, co-authorship networks, and natural language processing. These experimental results demonstrate that the newly developed algorithms are practical, effective, and immediately applicable for learning the structure of clusters in real-world data.
abstract_zh: 图聚类是无监督学习中的一个基本问题，在计算机科学和分析现实世界数据中有着广泛的应用。在许多实际应用中，我们发现集群具有显着的高层结构。在图聚类算法的设计和分析中，这一点经常被忽视，这些算法对图的结构做出了强有力的简化假设。本文解决了是否可以有效地学习簇结构的自然问题，并描述了用于学习图和超图中的这种结构的四种新算法结果。所有提出的理论结果都在不同领域的合成数据集和真实数据集上进行了广泛的评估，包括图像分类和分割、迁移网络、合着网络和自然语言处理。这些实验结果表明，新开发的算法实用、有效，并且可以立即应用于学习现实数据中的簇结构。

AI.tldr: 研究如何高效学习图中聚类的高层结构
AI.motivation: 现有图聚类算法常忽略聚类的高层结构，导致简化假设限制了实际应用效果，需探索更有效的结构学习方法
AI.method: 提出四种新算法，用于图和超图中聚类结构的学习，并通过合成及真实数据集（如图像分类、迁移网络等）进行验证
AI.result: 实验显示新算法在多个领域数据集上表现有效，证明其实际应用价值
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能有效学习聚类结构，为实际数据中的图聚类分析提供新方法

motivation: 现有图聚类算法常忽略聚类的高层结构，导致简化假设限制了实际应用效果，需探索更有效的结构学习方法
method: 提出四种新算法，用于图和超图中聚类结构的学习，并通过合成及真实数据集（如图像分类、迁移网络等）进行验证
result: 实验显示新算法在多个领域数据集上表现有效，证明其实际应用价值
conclusion: 提出的算法能有效学习聚类结构，为实际数据中的图聚类分析提供新方法
search_text: On Learning the Structure of Clusters in Graphs 关于学习图中簇的结构 Graph clustering is a fundamental problem in unsupervised learning, with numerous applications in computer science and in analysing real-world data. In many real-world applications, we find that the clusters have a significant high-level structure. This is often overlooked in the design and analysis of graph clustering algorithms which make strong simplifying assumptions about the structure of the graph. This thesis addresses the natural question of whether the structure of clusters can be learned efficiently and describes four new algorithmic results for learning such structure in graphs and hypergraphs. All of the presented theoretical results are extensively evaluated on both synthetic and real-word datasets of different domains, including image classification and segmentation, migration networks, co-authorship networks, and natural language processing. These experimental results demonstrate that the newly developed algorithms are practical, effective, and immediately applicable for learning the structure of clusters in real-world data. 图聚类是无监督学习中的一个基本问题，在计算机科学和分析现实世界数据中有着广泛的应用。在许多实际应用中，我们发现集群具有显着的高层结构。在图聚类算法的设计和分析中，这一点经常被忽视，这些算法对图的结构做出了强有力的简化假设。本文解决了是否可以有效地学习簇结构的自然问题，并描述了用于学习图和超图中的这种结构的四种新算法结果。所有提出的理论结果都在不同领域的合成数据集和真实数据集上进行了广泛的评估，包括图像分类和分割、迁移网络、合着网络和自然语言处理。这些实验结果表明，新开发的算法实用、有效，并且可以立即应用于学习现实数据中的簇结构。 研究如何高效学习图中聚类的高层结构 Peter Macgregor cs.DS,cs.LG,cs.SI

authors_text: Christopher Wolters,Brady Taylor,Edward Hanson,Xiaoxuan Yang,Ulf Schlichtmann,Yiran Chen
title: Biologically Plausible Learning on Neuromorphic Hardware Architectures
title_zh: 神经形态硬件架构的生物学合理学习
abstract: With an ever-growing number of parameters defining increasingly complex networks, Deep Learning has led to several breakthroughs surpassing human performance. As a result, data movement for these millions of model parameters causes a growing imbalance known as the memory wall. Neuromorphic computing is an emerging paradigm that confronts this imbalance by performing computations directly in analog memories. On the software side, the sequential Backpropagation algorithm prevents efficient parallelization and thus fast convergence. A novel method, Direct Feedback Alignment, resolves inherent layer dependencies by directly passing the error from the output to each layer. At the intersection of hardware/software co-design, there is a demand for developing algorithms that are tolerable to hardware nonidealities. Therefore, this work explores the interrelationship of implementing bio-plausible learning in-situ on neuromorphic hardware, emphasizing energy, area, and latency constraints. Using the benchmarking framework DNN+NeuroSim, we investigate the impact of hardware nonidealities and quantization on algorithm performance, as well as how network topologies and algorithm-level design choices can scale latency, energy and area consumption of a chip. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to compare the impact of different learning algorithms on Compute-In-Memory-based hardware and vice versa. The best results achieved for accuracy remain Backpropagation-based, notably when facing hardware imperfections. Direct Feedback Alignment, on the other hand, allows for significant speedup due to parallelization, reducing training time by a factor approaching N for N-layered networks.

As a result, data movement for these millions of model parameters causes a growing imbalance known as the memory wall. Neuromorphic computing is an emerging paradigm that confronts this imbalance by performing computations directly in analog memories. On the software side, the sequential Backpropagation algorithm prevents efficient parallelization and thus fast convergence. A novel method, Direct Feedback Alignment, resolves inherent layer dependencies by directly passing the error from the output to each layer. At the intersection of hardware/software co-design, there is a demand for developing algorithms that are tolerable to hardware nonidealities. Therefore, this work explores the interrelationship of implementing bio-plausible learning in-situ on neuromorphic hardware, emphasizing energy, area, and latency constraints. Using the benchmarking framework DNN+NeuroSim, we investigate the impact of hardware nonidealities and quantization on algorithm performance, as well as how network topologies and algorithm-level design choices can scale latency, energy and area consumption of a chip. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to compare the impact of different learning algorithms on Compute-In-Memory-based hardware and vice versa. The best results achieved for accuracy remain Backpropagation-based, notably when facing hardware imperfections. Direct Feedback Alignment, on the other hand, allows for significant speedup due to parallelization, reducing training time by a factor approaching N for N-layered networks.
abstract_zh: 随着定义日益复杂的网络的参数数量不断增加，深度学习带来了超越人类表现的多项突破。因此，数百万个模型参数的数据移动会导致日益严重的不平衡，称为内存墙。神经形态计算是一种新兴范例，它通过直接在模拟存储器中执行计算来应对这种不平衡。在软件方面，顺序反向传播算法阻碍了高效的并行化，从而阻碍了快速收敛。直接反馈对齐是一种新颖的方法，通过将输出中的误差直接传递到每一层来解决固有的层依赖性。在硬件/软件协同设计的交叉点，需要开发能够容忍硬件非理想性的算法。因此，这项工作探讨了在神经形态硬件上实现生物合理学习的相互关系，强调能量、面积和延迟限制。使用基准测试框架 DNN+NeuroSim，我们研究了硬件非理想性和量化对算法性能的影响，以及网络拓扑和算法级设计选择如何扩展芯片的延迟、能耗和面积消耗。据我们所知，这项工作首次比较了不同学习算法对基于内存计算的硬件的影响，反之亦然。准确率达到的最佳结果仍然是基于反向传播，特别是在面临硬件缺陷时。另一方面，直接反馈对齐可以通过并行化实现显着加速，从而将 N 层网络的训练时间减少接近 N 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在类脑硬件架构上实现生物可解释学习算法，分析硬件非理想性与算法性能的关系。
AI.motivation: 深度学习参数增长导致内存墙问题，传统反向传播算法效率低，需探索硬件友好的生物可解释学习方法。
AI.method: 利用DNN+NeuroSim框架，评估硬件非理想性、量化对算法的影响，并比较不同网络拓扑与算法设计对芯片能耗和延迟的影响。
AI.result: 反向传播在硬件缺陷下保持最高精度，直接反馈对齐算法因并行化使训练时间减少N倍（N为网络层数）。
AI.conclusion: 生物可解释算法需平衡硬件容错性与计算效率，反向传播仍具优势，而直接反馈对齐适合加速训练。
